heading: Hotels in Nairobi
description: Discover premium 5-star hotels, historic boutique stays, and luxury accommodations in Nairobi.

items.contentHtml:
Sarova Stanley Hotel Nairobi is a landmark 5-star heritage hotel located in the heart of Nairobi’s Central Business District, widely recognized as the oldest luxury hotel in the city. Established in 1902, it holds deep historical significance and has hosted notable figures such as Ernest Hemingway and Queen Elizabeth II, making it one of the most iconic places to stay in Nairobi for travelers seeking both luxury and history.

Positioned at the junction of Kenyatta Avenue and Kimathi Street, the hotel offers a prime location with easy access to key business districts, government offices, and major landmarks such as the Kenyatta International Convention Centre. This central positioning makes it especially convenient for business travelers and tourists looking to explore Nairobi’s CBD on foot.

The property features 210 elegantly designed rooms and suites that combine classic Victorian charm with modern amenities. Guests can expect features such as noise-cancelling windows, high-speed Wi-Fi, and refined interiors that reflect the hotel’s heritage while still providing contemporary comfort for both short and extended stays.

Dining at Sarova Stanley Hotel is one of its standout features, with multiple renowned restaurants and bars on-site. The Thai Chi Restaurant is highly regarded for its authentic Thai cuisine and tranquil setting, while the legendary Thorn Tree Café serves as a historic open-air bistro and one of Nairobi’s most famous meeting points. The Exchange Bar offers a classic “gentleman’s club” atmosphere with a selection of cocktails and bar bites, and the Pool Deck Restaurant provides al fresco dining with buffet options on the rooftop.

The hotel also offers a range of wellness and leisure facilities designed to enhance the guest experience. The Stanley Health Club includes a fully equipped gym, sauna, steam bath, and yoga sessions, while the heated rooftop swimming pool provides a relaxing escape with views over the city skyline.

Sarova Stanley is widely praised for its exceptional service, historic ambiance, and high-quality dining experiences, consistently earning strong reviews from both international and local guests. While some visitors note that certain areas reflect its heritage age, this character is often seen as part of its unique charm rather than a drawback.

For travelers searching for luxury hotels in Nairobi CBD, historic hotels in Nairobi, or centrally located 5-star accommodation with character and convenience, Sarova Stanley Hotel offers a distinctive blend of history, elegance, and modern hospitality.
items.name: Sarova Stanley

items.contentHtml:
Villa Rosa Kempinski is a premier 5-star luxury hotel located along Chiromo Road in Westlands, Nairobi, renowned for its distinctive pink façade and a seamless blend of European elegance with Kenyan hospitality. Positioned just minutes from Nairobi’s Central Business District and approximately 21 kilometres from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, it is one of the most sought-after luxury hotels in Nairobi for both business and leisure travelers.

The hotel features 200 elegantly designed rooms and suites spread across 10 floors, offering a refined stay experience with contemporary comforts. Accommodation ranges from Superior and Deluxe rooms to Executive rooms and high-end suites, including an expansive Presidential Suite. Each room is equipped with modern amenities such as high-speed Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, minibars, and dedicated workspaces, while Executive-level guests enjoy added benefits like express check-in and complimentary breakfast.

Villa Rosa Kempinski is also widely recognized as a leading culinary destination in Nairobi, offering a diverse selection of fine dining experiences. Guests can enjoy authentic Lebanese cuisine at the rooftop Tambourin restaurant, complete with an Arabian-themed ambiance and live entertainment, or explore Italian flavors at Lucca, known for its deli-style offerings and classic dishes. Café Villa Rosa serves international buffets and breakfast, while Sushi Mitsuki provides an exclusive high-end Japanese omakase experience. Additional spaces such as the K Lounge, Balcony Bar, and a dedicated cigar lounge offer refined settings for tea, cocktails, and social gatherings.

Wellness and relaxation are central to the hotel’s experience, with Kempinski The Spa offering a full range of treatments across multiple therapy rooms. Facilities include a sauna, steam room, jacuzzi, fully equipped fitness centre, and an outdoor heated swimming pool, making it ideal for guests seeking both relaxation and rejuvenation during their stay.

The hotel is equally well-equipped for business and events, featuring modern conference facilities including a grand ballroom, boardrooms, and flexible meeting spaces totaling approximately 660 square metres. This makes it a preferred venue for corporate events, conferences, and upscale social functions in Nairobi.

The overall atmosphere at Villa Rosa Kempinski is sophisticated, luxurious, and service-driven, consistently earning high ratings for its attention to detail, world-class dining, and premium hospitality standards. Its location in Westlands also provides easy access to shopping centres, restaurants, and Nairobi’s vibrant social scene.

For travelers searching for luxury hotels in Westlands Nairobi, 5-star accommodation near Nairobi CBD, or high-end hotels with fine dining and spa facilities, Villa Rosa Kempinski offers a world-class experience that combines comfort, elegance, and convenience.
items.name: Villa Rosa Kempinski Nairobi

items.contentHtml:
Tamarind Tree Hotel is a stylish 4-star boutique art hotel located along Langata Link Road within the iconic Carnivore grounds in Nairobi. Known for its contemporary African-inspired design and strategic location, the hotel is just 1.5 kilometres from Wilson Airport, making it a top choice for travelers connecting to safari destinations and those seeking convenient accommodation near Nairobi’s key attractions.

The hotel offers 160 spacious ensuite rooms and suites, each thoughtfully designed with vibrant décor and modern African art that reflects Kenya’s cultural identity. Room options include Standard King and Twin rooms as well as a range of suites such as Junior, Executive, Superior, and Family Suites. All rooms are equipped with modern amenities including high-speed Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and comfortable workspaces, while dedicated accessible rooms ensure a seamless stay for guests with mobility needs.

Dining at Tamarind Tree Hotel is diverse and convenient, with several on-site options catering to different preferences. The Tamambo Restaurant serves a mix of international cuisine in a relaxed setting, while the 24-hour Duka Coffee Shop provides casual dining and refreshments throughout the day. The Dawa Lounge offers a laid-back space for drinks and socializing, and guests also benefit from direct access to the world-famous Carnivore Restaurant, one of Nairobi’s most iconic dining experiences.

Leisure and wellness facilities are designed to enhance both relaxation and fitness during your stay. The hotel features a 20-meter outdoor heated swimming pool with a separate children’s pool, a fully equipped fitness centre, and a wellness sanctuary offering body therapies and massage treatments. These amenities make it suitable for both business travelers and families looking for a comfortable stay in Nairobi.

For corporate and social events, Tamarind Tree Hotel provides modern conference and meeting facilities, including a ballroom that can accommodate up to 250 guests. This makes it a popular venue for conferences, business meetings, and private events in Nairobi.

Its location offers easy access to some of Nairobi’s top tourist attractions, including Nairobi National Park, the Giraffe Centre, the Sheldrick Wildlife Trust, and the Karen Blixen Museum. The hotel is also approximately 20 minutes from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport via the Southern Bypass, adding to its appeal for international visitors.

The overall atmosphere is modern, artistic, and relaxed, combining boutique charm with practical convenience. It is particularly well-suited for safari travelers, business visitors, and tourists looking for a well-connected yet tranquil place to stay in Nairobi.

For those searching for boutique hotels in Nairobi, hotels near Wilson Airport, or stylish accommodation close to Nairobi National Park, Tamarind Tree Hotel offers a well-rounded experience with comfort, accessibility, and cultural flair.
items.name: Tamarind Tree Hotel

items.contentHtml:
Eka Hotel Nairobi is a contemporary 4-star business hotel located along Mombasa Road, offering one of the most convenient stays in Nairobi for travelers seeking easy access to Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and the city. Positioned just 5–10 minutes from JKIA via the Nairobi Expressway, the hotel is ideally suited for business travelers, transit passengers, and tourists looking for accommodation near the airport and Nairobi National Park.

The hotel features 167 modern, air-conditioned rooms designed with comfort and functionality in mind. Accommodation options include Superior rooms, Executive Suites, and specially designed accessible rooms for guests with additional needs. Each room is equipped with essential amenities such as high-speed Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, work desks, and contemporary furnishings, making it suitable for both short stays and extended business trips.

Dining at Eka Hotel Nairobi is diverse and convenient, with multiple on-site options catering to different tastes. The Galaxy Restaurant serves a variety of international cuisine through buffet and à la carte menus, often featuring live cooking stations that enhance the dining experience. The Soaring Eagle Spur offers a more casual, family-friendly setting known for its steaks, ribs, and burgers, while the Galaxy Bar & Deck provides a relaxed atmosphere for cocktails, drinks, and informal meetings.

The hotel offers a range of leisure and wellness facilities designed to balance work and relaxation. Guests have access to an outdoor swimming pool, a fully equipped gym, and a wellness centre offering spa treatments and relaxation services. These amenities make it a practical choice for travelers looking to unwind after long flights or busy workdays.

Eka Hotel Nairobi is also well-equipped for business and events, with five modern meeting and conference rooms fitted with advanced technology. Its strategic location along Mombasa Road, combined with its professional facilities, makes it a preferred venue for corporate meetings, workshops, and small conferences.

An added advantage is its proximity to a nearby shopping mall that includes a supermarket, pharmacy, and other essential services, providing extra convenience for guests during their stay. The hotel is also within close reach of Nairobi National Park, offering visitors a unique opportunity to combine business travel with wildlife experiences.

The overall atmosphere is modern, efficient, and business-focused, with a reputation for reliability, accessibility, and good service. Its location and amenities make it particularly appealing to international travelers, conference delegates, and those with early or late flights.

For those searching for hotels near JKIA Nairobi, business hotels on Mombasa Road, or convenient accommodation close to Nairobi airport, Eka Hotel Nairobi offers a practical and comfortable stay with excellent connectivity and essential amenities.
items.name: Eka Hotel Nairobi

items.contentHtml:
Nairobi Safari Club by Swiss-Belhotel is a unique all-suite hotel located in the heart of Nairobi’s Central Business District, at the junction of University Way and Koinange Street. As Kenya’s only all-suite hotel, it offers a distinctive accommodation experience tailored for both business and leisure travelers seeking extra space and comfort in a central city location, approximately 20–25 minutes from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport.

The hotel features 146 spacious suites spread across 16 floors, each designed with separate living and sleeping areas to provide a more residential feel compared to standard hotel rooms. This all-suite concept makes it particularly appealing for long stays, business travelers, and families. Each suite includes modern amenities such as air conditioning, satellite flat-screen TVs, high-speed Wi-Fi, safety deposit boxes, and in many cases, private balconies with views of Nairobi’s skyline. The property was rebranded under the Swiss-Belhotel International portfolio in 2023, enhancing its global standards while maintaining its classic charm.

Dining at Nairobi Safari Club offers a mix of local and international cuisine across several on-site venues. The Safari Restaurant serves daily buffet meals for breakfast, lunch, and dinner, featuring a variety of Kenyan and global dishes. The Terrace Bar & Restaurant provides a more relaxed à la carte dining experience, while the poolside bar offers light snacks and drinks in a casual outdoor setting next to the swimming pool.

The hotel also provides a range of leisure and wellness facilities designed for relaxation and convenience. Guests have access to an outdoor swimming pool, a fully equipped fitness centre, and a spa and wellness facility offering massages and sauna services. These amenities make it suitable for both short business trips and extended stays in Nairobi.

Nairobi Safari Club is a well-established venue for conferences, corporate meetings, and social events. Its flagship Mawingo Hall can accommodate up to 300 guests, making it ideal for weddings and large gatherings, while additional meeting rooms and executive boardrooms cater to smaller business functions and private events.

The overall atmosphere of the hotel is often described as classic and vintage, offering a sense of old Nairobi charm combined with modern functionality. Guests frequently highlight the professionalism of the staff, particularly in service areas such as concierge and dining, as well as the value offered through spacious accommodations in a prime CBD location.

For travelers searching for hotels in Nairobi CBD, all-suite accommodation in Nairobi, or centrally located hotels for business and long stays, Nairobi Safari Club by Swiss-Belhotel provides a comfortable and practical option with generous space, convenience, and a strong city-center presence.
items.name: Nairobi Safari Club By Swiss-Belhotel

items.contentHtml:
Palacina The Residence & The Suites is a 5-star boutique hotel and luxury apartment complex located in the serene Kilimani/State House area of Nairobi along Kitale Lane, just off Dennis Pritt Road. Known for its refined design and peaceful environment, it is often described as an oasis within the city, offering a quiet retreat for travelers seeking privacy, comfort, and personalized service while still being close to Nairobi’s key business and diplomatic zones.

Set within beautifully landscaped gardens and expansive manicured lawns, the property provides a calm and exclusive atmosphere away from the busy urban pace. Its location places it approximately 4 kilometres from Nairobi’s Central Business District and about 30 minutes from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, making it convenient for both business travelers and long-stay guests.

Palacina offers a range of luxurious accommodation options designed to suit different travel needs, from short stays to extended residencies. The Palacina Suites include a limited number of high-end units, with standout penthouse suites featuring spacious layouts, private balconies, and elegant teak wood finishes. In addition, the property provides fully serviced one, two, and three-bedroom executive apartments, business residences with modern kitchenettes, and studio units designed for comfort and independence.

Dining at the hotel is centered around the Palacina Bistro, which serves a selection of international and locally inspired cuisine in a cozy yet elegant setting. Guests can enjoy meals indoors by the fireplace or outdoors on the terrace, enhancing the relaxed and intimate dining experience that complements the boutique nature of the property.

The hotel places strong emphasis on wellness and relaxation, offering a comprehensive range of facilities including a 24-hour fitness centre, a massage spa, a steam room, and both an outdoor swimming pool and a large heated indoor pool. These amenities cater to guests looking for both active and restorative experiences during their stay.

Palacina is also equipped for business and private events, featuring meeting rooms, an executive boardroom, and a 24-hour business centre. Additional guest services such as complimentary Wi-Fi, secure parking, laundry services, and airport transfers further enhance convenience and comfort.

The overall experience at Palacina The Residence & The Suites is defined by understated luxury, privacy, and attention to detail. Its boutique scale and family-owned approach create a personalized atmosphere that distinguishes it from larger hotel chains in Nairobi.

For travelers searching for boutique hotels in Nairobi, luxury serviced apartments in Kilimani, or peaceful accommodation near Nairobi CBD, Palacina offers a refined and tranquil stay combining elegance, space, and exceptional hospitality.
items.name: Palacina The Residence & The Suites

items.contentHtml:
Fairview Hotel Nairobi, part of the Vignette Collection by IHG, is a historic 4-star boutique-style hotel located in the Upper Hill district, offering a unique blend of heritage charm and modern comfort. Built from early 20th-century bluestone and set across 2.5 hectares of beautifully landscaped gardens, the hotel is often described as an “urban oasis” in Nairobi, providing a tranquil escape within one of the city’s key business hubs.

The hotel features 127 elegantly designed rooms that combine classic décor with contemporary amenities. Guests can choose from garden rooms and Manor House suites, many of which have been recently renovated to enhance comfort while preserving the property’s timeless character. Each room is equipped with modern essentials such as high-speed Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and workspaces, making it suitable for both business and leisure stays.

Dining at Fairview Hotel Nairobi is diverse and refined, with multiple on-site restaurants offering different culinary experiences. Pango Brasserie provides an upscale dining atmosphere often accompanied by live piano music, while Mukutan Garden Café offers a more relaxed outdoor setting surrounded by water features and greenery. The Pwani Pool Restaurant delivers casual poolside dining with an international menu, creating a balanced mix of formal and informal dining options within the property.

The hotel also offers a range of leisure and wellness facilities designed to complement its serene environment. Guests can enjoy an outdoor swimming pool, a fully equipped fitness centre, and 24-hour room service. The expansive gardens and open spaces further enhance the experience, making it ideal for relaxation, informal meetings, or quiet work sessions.

Fairview Hotel Nairobi is well-equipped for business and events, with meeting rooms and event spaces suitable for conferences, corporate functions, and weddings. Its location in Upper Hill places it close to major corporate offices, embassies, and government institutions, making it particularly convenient for business travelers.

Security is a notable feature of the hotel, with thorough measures such as vehicle checks and bag screening in place, reflecting its proximity to diplomatic zones. This contributes to a strong sense of safety and comfort for both local and international guests.

The overall guest experience is consistently praised for its professional and friendly service, peaceful atmosphere, and well-maintained grounds. While the property’s layout can involve short walks between buildings, this is often seen as part of its charm, allowing guests to fully enjoy the lush garden setting.

For travelers searching for boutique hotels in Upper Hill Nairobi, garden hotels in Nairobi, or peaceful accommodation near Nairobi CBD, Fairview Hotel Nairobi offers a distinctive stay that combines history, greenery, and modern hospitality.
items.name: Fairview Hotel Nairobi, Vignette Collection by IHG

items.contentHtml:
Kwetu Nairobi, Curio Collection by Hilton is a 5-star boutique hotel located in the exclusive Gigiri/Kitisuru area of Nairobi, set on the edge of the tranquil Karura Forest. Designed to offer a more personal and residence-style experience, the name “Kwetu,” meaning “our home” in Swahili, reflects its focus on comfort, privacy, and a warm, welcoming atmosphere distinct from traditional corporate hotels in Nairobi.

The hotel features 102 elegantly designed rooms distributed across five interconnected blocks, creating a unique layout that blends contemporary luxury with subtle historical Kenyan influences. Each room is thoughtfully styled with modern amenities such as high-speed Wi-Fi, smart TVs, and refined interiors, offering a balance of sophistication and comfort for both business and leisure travelers.

Dining at Kwetu Nairobi is a standout experience, with six distinct food and beverage outlets catering to a variety of tastes. Meko serves Mediterranean-inspired cuisine in a stylish open-kitchen setting, while Upepo, the rooftop bar and restaurant, offers a vibrant atmosphere with sweeping views over the Karura Forest canopy. Zabe provides a more intimate, speakeasy-style cocktail experience, and the 1893 Brew Bar highlights specialty Kenyan coffee, adding a local touch to the hotel’s culinary offerings.

The hotel also emphasizes wellness and relaxation, featuring a year-round outdoor swimming pool and a fully equipped fitness centre. Plans for a dedicated wellness sanctuary further enhance its positioning as a lifestyle-focused destination, ideal for guests seeking both relaxation and rejuvenation during their stay in Nairobi.

Kwetu Nairobi’s location in Gigiri places it close to major international institutions such as the United Nations headquarters, as well as cultural attractions like the Nairobi National Museum. At the same time, its proximity to Karura Forest provides guests with access to nature trails, cycling routes, and a peaceful green environment rarely found in urban hotels.

The overall atmosphere is intimate, design-forward, and nature-inspired, appealing to travelers who value boutique luxury, curated experiences, and a quieter setting away from the busy city centre. Its architecture, service style, and curated spaces create a sense of exclusivity while maintaining a relaxed and welcoming feel.

For those searching for luxury boutique hotels in Nairobi, hotels near Karura Forest, or high-end accommodation in Gigiri, Kwetu Nairobi offers a refined and contemporary stay that combines design, nature, and personalized hospitality.
items.name: Kwetu Nairobi, Curio Collection By Hilton

items.contentHtml:
Fairmont The Norfolk is an iconic 5-star luxury hotel in Nairobi, widely regarded as one of the city’s most historic and prestigious landmarks. Established in 1904, it is the second oldest hotel in Nairobi and has long been associated with explorers, dignitaries, and global travelers, offering a timeless blend of heritage, elegance, and modern luxury in the heart of the city.

Located along Harry Thuku Road, the hotel sits within four acres of lush tropical gardens, creating a serene, resort-like atmosphere despite its central location. Its distinctive Tudor-style architecture and rich history, including hosting notable figures such as Theodore Roosevelt, make it a cultural landmark as well as a luxury accommodation. The hotel is also conveniently positioned near key attractions such as the National Museums of Kenya and the Kenya National Theatre.

The property features 125 rooms, including 108 guest rooms and 17 suites, all designed to combine early 20th-century charm with contemporary comfort. Accommodation options range from cozy Fairmont Rooms to Deluxe Courtyard Rooms overlooking the gardens, as well as spacious Signature Suites inspired by influential Kenyan figures. Rooms are equipped with modern amenities such as marble bathrooms, rain showers, air conditioning, and high-speed Wi-Fi, ensuring a comfortable stay for both business and leisure travelers.

Dining at Fairmont The Norfolk is a refined experience, with several acclaimed restaurants and bars on-site. The Lord Delamere Terrace offers a historic open-air setting serving both international cuisine and authentic Kenyan dishes, while Tatu Restaurant is a well-known fine dining steakhouse delivering a premium culinary experience. Cin Cin Bar provides a stylish space for cocktails and tapas, making it a popular spot for social gatherings and evening relaxation.

The hotel offers a range of wellness and leisure facilities designed to enhance the guest experience. These include a heated outdoor swimming pool, a fully equipped fitness centre with personal trainers, and the Pambo Spa, which provides a variety of treatments including aromatherapy and massage services. Business travelers also benefit from a dedicated business centre and convenient shuttle services within the city.

The overall atmosphere at Fairmont The Norfolk is often described as a tranquil oasis, combining an “old world” charm with modern luxury standards. Guests frequently highlight the peaceful garden setting, attentive service, and the hotel’s ability to provide a calm retreat within Nairobi’s busy urban environment.

Sustainability is also a key focus, with the hotel sourcing a significant portion of its food locally and operating on renewable energy, reflecting a commitment to responsible hospitality. Additionally, the on-site boutique offers locally inspired crafts and fashion, adding a cultural dimension to the guest experience.

For travelers searching for luxury hotels in Nairobi, historic hotels in Nairobi CBD, or heritage stays with garden settings, Fairmont The Norfolk offers a unique combination of history, elegance, and world-class hospitality in one of the city’s most iconic locations.
items.name: Fairmont The Norfolk

items.contentHtml:
The Panari Hotel is a 4-star upscale hotel located along Mombasa Road in Nairobi, offering a strategic and convenient stay just 10 minutes from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport. Its prime location also places it within close proximity to Nairobi’s Central Business District and Nairobi National Park, making it an ideal choice for both business travelers and tourists looking for accessible accommodation in Nairobi.

The hotel features 136 well-appointed rooms designed to provide comfort and tranquility, enhanced by soundproofed double-glazed windows that minimize noise from the nearby highway and airport. Room categories include Standard, Superior, Deluxe, and the luxurious Royal Jade Suite, with many rooms offering scenic views of either Nairobi National Park or the city skyline. Each room is equipped with modern amenities such as air conditioning, high-speed Wi-Fi, satellite TV, and a minibar, ensuring a comfortable stay for both short and extended visits.

One of the hotel’s most distinctive features is the Panari Ice Skating Rink, the only solar-powered ice rink in East and Central Africa. Spanning approximately 15,000 square feet, it provides a unique entertainment experience for guests and visitors, accommodating up to 200 skaters at a time and operating daily, making it a standout attraction among hotels in Nairobi.

Dining at The Panari Hotel is diverse, with several on-site restaurants and lounges offering a range of culinary experiences. The Red Garnet Restaurant delivers fine dining with international cuisine and buffet options, while the Black Gold Café is a popular spot for freshly brewed coffee, light meals, and casual meetings. The Crystal Bar and Ruby Lounge provide elegant settings for cocktails and relaxation, with panoramic views that enhance the overall dining experience.

The hotel also offers extensive wellness and fitness facilities through the Dolphin Health Club, which includes a large, fully equipped gym, an indoor heated swimming pool, a spa, sauna, and steam rooms. These amenities cater to guests seeking relaxation, fitness, and rejuvenation during their stay.

Additional entertainment options within the Panari Sky Centre complex include a cinema and a casino, making the hotel a complete lifestyle destination beyond just accommodation. This combination of leisure, dining, and entertainment adds to its appeal for both local and international visitors.

The overall atmosphere is modern, lively, and multifunctional, balancing business convenience with leisure and entertainment. Its accessibility, unique features, and range of amenities make it a reliable and versatile option for travelers.

For those searching for hotels near JKIA Nairobi, hotels on Mombasa Road, or hotels with unique amenities in Nairobi, The Panari Hotel offers a distinctive stay combining comfort, convenience, and entertainment in one location.
items.name: The Panari Hotel

items.contentHtml:
Nairobi Serena Hotel is a premier 5-star luxury hotel located along Kenyatta Avenue, adjacent to Central Park and within walking distance of Nairobi’s Central Business District. Renowned for its distinctive Pan-African design and beautifully landscaped tropical gardens, the hotel offers a tranquil retreat in the heart of the city and is a proud member of the Leading Hotels of the World.

The hotel features 199 elegantly remodelled guest rooms and suites designed to combine contemporary comfort with African-inspired aesthetics. Accommodation options range from Deluxe and Twin rooms with garden or city views to spacious Executive rooms and suites with separate living areas. For guests seeking a more exclusive experience, specialty suites such as the Chale Presidential Suite and Lamu Suite provide elevated luxury. All rooms are equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, satellite TV, and refined furnishings suited for both business and leisure travelers.

Dining at Nairobi Serena Hotel is a highlight of the guest experience, offering a variety of upscale and casual culinary options. Mandhari Fine Dining provides an elegant setting with seasonal à la carte menus, wine pairings, and live piano music, while Café Maghreb serves international cuisine and themed buffets throughout the day. Aksum Bar features Ethiopian-inspired décor and a curated selection of wines and cocktails, while the Pool Bar and Bambara Lounge offer relaxed spaces for snacks and drinks, including a swim-up bar. The hotel’s Sunday brunch is particularly popular, attracting both guests and Nairobi residents.

Wellness and leisure facilities are centered around the Maisha Health Club & Spa, a Moroccan-inspired sanctuary offering a range of treatments including aromatherapy, facials, and massages. Guests also have access to a 25-metre heated outdoor swimming pool, a fully equipped gym, an aerobics and yoga studio, as well as sauna and steam rooms. The hotel further enhances its offering by providing complimentary golf privileges at the nearby Royal Nairobi Golf Course.

Nairobi Serena Hotel is also a leading venue for conferences, meetings, and social events in Nairobi. It features 11 versatile event spaces, including the Ballroom Suite, which can host up to 400 guests, and smaller flower-themed rooms designed for more intimate meetings. Professional event planning services, modern presentation equipment, and offsite catering options make it a preferred choice for corporate and private functions.

The overall atmosphere is refined, peaceful, and culturally rich, with a strong emphasis on service, design, and guest comfort. Its central location, combined with its garden setting, creates a unique balance between accessibility and serenity.

For travelers searching for luxury hotels in Nairobi CBD, 5-star hotels near Central Park, or high-end accommodation with spa and fine dining in Nairobi, Nairobi Serena Hotel offers a sophisticated and well-rounded experience in one of the city’s most prestigious locations.
items.name: Nairobi Serena Hotel

items.contentHtml:
The Boma Nairobi is a sophisticated 5-star hotel located in the South C (Bellevue) area of Nairobi, offering a peaceful and well-connected stay just 10–15 minutes from both Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and Wilson Airport. Managed by Aleph Hospitality and owned by the Kenya Red Cross Society, the hotel is known for combining modern luxury with a strong focus on wellness, comfort, and socially responsible hospitality.

The hotel features 148 elegantly designed rooms and suites, including Superior, Deluxe, Business, and Presidential options, all crafted to provide a quiet and comfortable environment. Each room is equipped with air conditioning, soundproofing, high-speed Wi-Fi, and contemporary furnishings, making it suitable for business travelers, transit guests, and leisure visitors looking for a refined stay in Nairobi.

Dining at The Boma Nairobi offers a variety of culinary experiences across multiple venues. Johari Restaurant serves international cuisine in a stylish setting with garden views and alfresco dining options, and is especially popular for its buffet breakfast and brunch. Tembo Bistro provides a more relaxed and lively atmosphere with grilled dishes, pizzas, and happy hour specials, while the Atrium Coffee Shop offers a calm space for beverages and light snacks. A dedicated cocktail lounge adds a sophisticated touch for evening drinks and social gatherings.

Wellness and fitness are central to the hotel’s offering, with a full-service spa that includes a sauna, steam room, and hot tub, as well as a modern health club equipped with advanced fitness facilities. Guests can also enjoy a rooftop outdoor swimming pool, providing a relaxing space with views over the surrounding area.

The Boma Nairobi is well-equipped for meetings, conferences, and events, featuring 12 versatile event spaces including the Ndovu Ballroom, which can host up to 250 guests. Additional outdoor tented spaces can accommodate larger functions of up to 450 guests, making it a popular venue for corporate events, weddings, and social gatherings in Nairobi.

The hotel’s location offers convenient access to key attractions and transport routes, including Nairobi National Park and the Nairobi Expressway. Guests benefit from services such as airport transfers, secure on-site parking, and easy connectivity to both the city centre and major travel hubs.

Sustainability is an important aspect of the hotel’s operations, with initiatives such as reducing single-use plastics and promoting environmentally conscious practices, aligning with its broader mission through the Kenya Red Cross Society.

The overall atmosphere is calm, modern, and service-oriented, making it ideal for travelers seeking a quiet yet accessible luxury hotel in Nairobi. Its blend of comfort, wellness, and convenience makes it particularly appealing for both short stays and extended visits.

For those searching for hotels near JKIA Nairobi, 5-star hotels in South C, or wellness-focused accommodation in Nairobi, The Boma Nairobi offers a balanced and high-quality stay with excellent amenities and accessibility.
items.name: The Boma Nairobi

items.contentHtml:
Holiday Inn Nairobi Two Rivers Mall is a contemporary 4-star hotel located within the vibrant Two Rivers Mall complex along Limuru Road in the Runda area of Nairobi. As part of the IHG brand, the hotel offers a modern and convenient stay with direct access to one of East Africa’s largest shopping and entertainment destinations, making it a popular choice for both business and leisure travelers.

The hotel is seamlessly integrated into Two Rivers Mall, giving guests immediate access to over 200 retail outlets, restaurants, and entertainment facilities. Visitors can enjoy attractions such as the iconic Nairobi Eye Ferris wheel and Funscapes Theme Park, making it especially appealing for families and travelers looking for a complete lifestyle experience in one location.

Accommodation at Holiday Inn Nairobi Two Rivers Mall is modern, comfortable, and designed for functionality. Rooms are air-conditioned and equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi, workspaces, and contemporary furnishings. Guests can choose from Standard rooms, Premium rooms with views of Karura Forest or the mall’s skyline, and spacious one-bedroom suites offering additional living space and panoramic views.

Dining options include an on-site restaurant and bar/lounge serving a variety of international dishes, along with 24-hour room service for added convenience. A buffet breakfast is available daily, catering to both business travelers and families. The hotel also participates in the brand’s “Kids Stay & Eat Free” program, making it a family-friendly accommodation option in Nairobi.

Leisure and wellness facilities include a rooftop infinity swimming pool that offers scenic views of the surrounding area, as well as a fully equipped fitness centre for guests looking to maintain their workout routine during their stay. These amenities provide a balance of relaxation and activity within a modern urban setting.

The hotel is also well-suited for business travel, featuring multiple meeting rooms and coworking spaces designed for conferences, workshops, and corporate events. Its proximity to key diplomatic and business hubs, including the United Nations Office at Nairobi and Village Market, further enhances its appeal for international professionals.

Sustainability initiatives are part of the hotel’s ongoing development, including the installation of solar panels to improve energy efficiency. Additional conveniences such as free secure parking and fast internet connectivity contribute to a smooth and comfortable guest experience.

The overall atmosphere is modern, convenient, and family-friendly, combining the reliability of an international hotel brand with the excitement of a major shopping and entertainment complex.

For travelers searching for hotels in Two Rivers Mall Nairobi, hotels near Gigiri and Runda, or family-friendly hotels with shopping and entertainment access, Holiday Inn Nairobi Two Rivers Mall offers a well-rounded stay with comfort, convenience, and lifestyle integration.
items.name: Holiday Inn Nairobi Two Rivers Mall By IHG

items.contentHtml:
Hilton Garden Inn Nairobi Airport is a refined 4-star hotel located along Mombasa Road, approximately 7 kilometres from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport. Designed with convenience and comfort in mind, it is one of the most popular hotels near JKIA Nairobi, especially for transit passengers, business travelers, and safari guests seeking a seamless airport stay.

The hotel offers modern, well-appointed rooms designed for rest and efficiency, featuring comfortable beds, soundproofed interiors, high-speed Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and dedicated workspaces. The soundproofing is particularly valued by guests due to the hotel’s proximity to both the airport and a major highway, ensuring a მშვიდ and uninterrupted stay.

Dining is centered around The Great American Grill®, which serves a mix of international and local cuisine, including a daily buffet breakfast available at an additional cost. Guests can also enjoy drinks at the on-site bar or access light snacks and essentials at the 24-hour convenience shop, making it easy to dine at any time of day or night.

One of the standout features of Hilton Garden Inn Nairobi Airport is its rooftop infinity swimming pool, which is heated year-round and offers views over Nairobi’s skyline and surrounding areas. The hotel also includes a 24-hour fitness centre and a fully equipped business centre with meeting rooms, catering to both leisure and corporate guests.

A major advantage of staying at the hotel is its complimentary 24/7 airport shuttle service, providing reliable and stress-free transfers to and from JKIA. Additional transport services, including paid transfers to Wilson Airport, are also available. Free on-site parking further adds to the convenience for guests with private transport.

The hotel also features a unique complimentary self-service laundry facility, which is especially appreciated by travelers returning from safaris or extended trips across Kenya. This practical amenity enhances its appeal as a functional and traveler-friendly accommodation option.

Its location provides easy access to nearby attractions such as Nairobi National Park, making it a convenient base for short wildlife excursions before or after flights. The combination of accessibility, comfort, and reliable service makes it a preferred choice for international visitors.

The overall atmosphere is modern, efficient, and service-oriented, with consistent praise for the professionalism of staff, particularly at the front desk and shuttle services.

For travelers searching for hotels near JKIA Nairobi, airport hotels with free shuttle service, or convenient transit accommodation in Nairobi, Hilton Garden Inn Nairobi Airport offers a reliable and comfortable stay with excellent connectivity and essential amenities.
items.name: Hilton Garden Inn Nairobi Airport

items.contentHtml:
Sarova Panafric is a contemporary 4-star luxury hotel located in Nairobi’s Upper Hill district, just a 5-minute drive from the Central Business District. Known for its distinctive Afro-chic design and rich Kenyan heritage, the hotel offers a stylish and tranquil retreat for both business and leisure travelers seeking accommodation close to Nairobi’s key commercial and cultural hubs.

The hotel features 176 well-appointed rooms, including a selection of fully furnished serviced apartments ideal for extended stays. Each room is designed with a blend of modern comfort and African-inspired décor, offering amenities such as high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, and spacious work areas. A unique highlight is the Wangari Maathai Wing, which includes a dedicated section of ensuite rooms exclusively designed for female travelers, emphasizing privacy, comfort, and security.

Dining at Sarova Panafric is centered around its well-known Flame Tree Restaurant & Bar, a long-standing Nairobi favorite offering a diverse menu in an open terrace setting with views of the city. The Deck Pool Bar & Lounge provides a more relaxed environment surrounded by lush gardens, making it a popular spot for social gatherings, private events, and the hotel’s signature Sunday brunch experience.

The hotel offers a range of wellness and leisure facilities designed to enhance relaxation and well-being. The Tulia Wellness Centre includes a spa offering various treatments, a fully equipped fitness centre, as well as sauna and steam room facilities. The outdoor pool area adds to the hotel’s calm and resort-like atmosphere within the city.

Sarova Panafric is also a prominent venue for business meetings, conferences, and social events, with multiple meeting rooms and event spaces that regularly host corporate functions, diplomatic gatherings, and high-level discussions. Its location in Upper Hill makes it particularly convenient for professionals working in Nairobi’s business district.

With a history dating back to 1965, the hotel has hosted notable African leaders such as Jomo Kenyatta, Kwame Nkrumah, and Julius Nyerere, adding a layer of historical significance to its modern appeal. Its location also provides access to nearby attractions including the Nairobi National Museum and other cultural landmarks.

The overall atmosphere is elegant, relaxed, and culturally rich, combining heritage with contemporary hospitality. Guests often appreciate its peaceful environment, distinctive design, and convenient proximity to both the city centre and major transport routes.

For travelers searching for hotels in Upper Hill Nairobi, Afro-chic hotels in Nairobi, or 4-star hotels near Nairobi CBD, Sarova Panafric offers a refined and comfortable stay with a strong sense of identity and location advantage.
items.name: Sarova Panafric

items.contentHtml:
Hotel Boulevard Nairobi is a historic 3-star hotel located along Harry Thuku Road in the heart of Nairobi’s Central Business District. Originally established decades ago and recently refurbished in 2022, the hotel combines classic charm with modern updates, offering a peaceful and green retreat within one of the city’s busiest areas.

Set amidst lush palm gardens, the hotel is often described as a “hidden gem” in Nairobi CBD, providing a quiet and relaxed atmosphere despite its central location. Its position next to the University of Nairobi and close to key cultural landmarks makes it especially convenient for both business and leisure travelers exploring the city.

The hotel features 70 well-appointed guest rooms, including Single, Double, Twin, and Triple options designed to cater to different travel needs. Many rooms offer views of the gardens or swimming pool, enhancing the sense of calm within the property. Rooms are equipped with essential amenities for a comfortable stay, although some rely on fans instead of air conditioning, reflecting the hotel’s traditional structure.

Dining at Hotel Boulevard Nairobi is centered around its Al Fresco Restaurant, which offers outdoor dining in a garden setting with a menu that blends international and local cuisine, including popular wood-fired pizzas. The Garden Sports Bar & Lounge provides a relaxed space for drinks and casual socializing, making it a popular spot for both guests and local visitors.

Leisure facilities include a large outdoor swimming pool surrounded by greenery, creating a resort-like feel within the city. The landscaped gardens also serve as ideal spaces for relaxation, informal meetings, or quiet moments away from the urban environment.

The hotel is well-equipped for business and events, offering modern conference and meeting facilities suitable for both small gatherings and larger residential conferences. Its central location enhances its appeal for corporate travelers and organizations hosting events in Nairobi.

One of the hotel’s key advantages is its proximity to major attractions within walking distance, including the Nairobi National Museum and Snake Park, Kenya National Theatre, and Central Park. This makes it a convenient base for visitors interested in culture, history, and city exploration.

The overall guest experience is often praised for friendly and attentive service, cleanliness, and high-quality food. While some rooms facing the expressway may experience noise, the garden-facing areas maintain a peaceful and relaxing ambiance.

For travelers searching for affordable hotels in Nairobi CBD, garden hotels in Nairobi, or centrally located accommodation near Nairobi National Museum, Hotel Boulevard Nairobi offers a charming and practical stay with a unique blend of tranquility and accessibility.
items.name: Hotel Boulevard Nairobi, City Centre CBD

items.contentHtml:
The Zehneria Hotel, also known as The Zehneria by Sarovar Portico, is a 3-star boutique-style business hotel located along Karuna Road in the Westlands area of Nairobi. Known for its central and convenient location, the hotel is within walking distance of major shopping destinations such as Sarit Centre and Westgate Shopping Mall, making it a practical choice for both business travelers and tourists exploring Nairobi.

The hotel offers approximately 55–56 well-appointed rooms and suites designed for comfort and functionality. Accommodation options include Superior Rooms and Luxury Suites, some of which feature kitchenettes for added convenience during longer stays. Each room is equipped with modern amenities such as air conditioning, flat-screen TVs, minibars, and high-speed Wi-Fi, providing a comfortable and efficient stay in Nairobi’s commercial hub.

Dining at The Zehneria Hotel is centered around the Seasons Restaurant & Bar, which operates 24 hours a day and offers a diverse menu of international cuisine. Guests can enjoy a mix of Continental, Asian, African, and Italian dishes, making it suitable for a wide range of tastes and dining preferences throughout the day.

The hotel also provides a selection of wellness and leisure facilities, including an outdoor swimming pool, a health club, and a full-service spa offering treatments such as deep-tissue and full-body massages. These amenities allow guests to relax and unwind after a day of business meetings or exploring Nairobi.

For corporate travelers, The Zehneria Hotel offers business-friendly facilities including a modern conference room, a business centre, and reliable high-speed internet connectivity across the property. Its location in Westlands further enhances its appeal, providing easy access to offices, restaurants, and entertainment spots in one of Nairobi’s most vibrant districts.

Accessibility is well considered, with wheelchair-friendly entrances, parking, and elevators ensuring a comfortable experience for all guests. The hotel is located approximately 4 kilometres from Nairobi’s Central Business District and about a 30-minute drive from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, depending on traffic conditions.

The overall atmosphere is practical, comfortable, and business-oriented, offering good value for travelers looking for affordable accommodation in Westlands without compromising on essential amenities.

For those searching for budget-friendly hotels in Westlands Nairobi, boutique hotels near Sarit Centre, or convenient business hotels in Nairobi, The Zehneria Hotel provides a reliable and well-located option with comfort, accessibility, and value.
items.name: The Zehneria Hotel

items.contentHtml:
Four Points by Sheraton Nairobi Airport is a modern 4-star hotel located within the Jomo Kenyatta International Airport complex, making it one of the most convenient airport hotels in Nairobi. Recognized as Africa’s Leading Airport Hotel 2025, it is a top choice for transit passengers, business travelers, and visitors seeking seamless connectivity to JKIA.

The hotel is designed with efficiency and comfort in mind, offering contemporary rooms equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi, comfortable bedding, soundproofing, and functional workspaces. Its proximity to the airport, combined with a complimentary 24-hour shuttle service that takes approximately five minutes to reach the terminals, makes it ideal for early departures, late arrivals, and short stays in Nairobi.

Dining at Four Points by Sheraton Nairobi Airport is flexible and traveler-friendly, with The Marketplace serving international cuisine throughout the day in a relaxed setting. The Lobby Bar provides freshly brewed Kenyan Arabica coffee, pastries, and light bites, while 24-hour room service ensures guests can dine at any time, regardless of flight schedules.

One of the standout features of the hotel is its rooftop leisure area, which includes a swimming pool, a fully equipped fitness centre, and the Tazama Rooftop Bar & Grill. This elevated space offers unique views stretching toward Nairobi National Park, allowing guests to enjoy a blend of city and nature even during a short airport stay.

Wellness is also a key part of the experience, with the Olakira Luxe Spa offering a range of treatments including Swedish and deep tissue massages. These facilities are particularly valued by travelers looking to relax and recharge between flights or after long journeys.

The overall atmosphere is modern, efficient, and service-oriented, with a strong focus on convenience and comfort for international travelers. Guests consistently highlight the speed of airport transfers, quality of service, and the well-maintained facilities.

For those searching for hotels at JKIA Nairobi, airport hotels with free shuttle service, or convenient transit accommodation in Nairobi, Four Points by Sheraton Nairobi Airport offers a premium and highly efficient stay with excellent amenities and unbeatable location.
items.name: Four Points by Sheraton Nairobi Airport

items.contentHtml:
PrideInn Westlands Luxury Boutique Hotel is a centrally located hotel in the vibrant Westlands district of Nairobi, offering a blend of contemporary style and personalized hospitality. Its prime location along Westlands Road provides easy access to major attractions such as Sarit Centre, Westgate Shopping Mall, and the Nairobi National Museum, making it a convenient base for both business and leisure travelers.

The hotel features 28 well-designed, air-conditioned rooms that combine comfort with modern aesthetics. Guests can enjoy amenities such as flat-screen Smart TVs, tea and coffee-making facilities, soundproof windows, and views of either the city or surrounding greenery. The rooms are tailored to provide a quiet and relaxing environment despite being in one of Nairobi’s busiest commercial areas.

Dining at PrideInn Westlands is centered around Sayari All Day Dining, which offers a diverse menu of local and international cuisine, including Indian dishes and barbecue options. The restaurant provides both indoor and outdoor seating, creating a flexible dining experience for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Guests frequently highlight the quality and variety of the breakfast buffet as a standout feature of their stay.

The hotel is well-equipped for business travelers, with a 24-hour business centre, conference facilities, and a banquet hall suitable for meetings, training sessions, and small corporate events. Its location in Westlands further enhances its appeal for professionals needing quick access to offices, embassies, and commercial hubs.

Additional guest services include 24-hour room service, free high-speed Wi-Fi, a lounge bar, laundry services, and airport transfers available at an extra cost. While the hotel does not feature a swimming pool, it compensates with strong service standards and practical amenities designed for convenience and comfort.

The overall atmosphere is intimate, efficient, and service-driven, with staff consistently praised for their friendliness, attentiveness, and professionalism. The hotel is particularly valued for offering a boutique-style experience at competitive rates within Nairobi’s upscale Westlands area.

For travelers searching for boutique hotels in Westlands Nairobi, affordable luxury hotels in Nairobi, or centrally located accommodation near Sarit Centre, PrideInn Westlands Luxury Boutique Hotel offers a comfortable and well-positioned stay with excellent value and personalized service.
items.name: PrideInn Westlands Luxury Boutique Hotel

items.contentHtml:
Golden Tulip Westlands Nairobi is a premium 4-star contemporary hotel located along Muthithi Road in the heart of Nairobi’s vibrant Westlands district. Known for its modern design and central location, the hotel is a popular choice for both business travelers and tourists, offering easy access to major shopping centres such as Sarit Centre, Westgate Mall, and the nearby Broadwalk Mall.

The hotel features 94 well-appointed, air-conditioned rooms designed for comfort and functionality. Accommodation options range from Standard and Superior rooms to spacious Junior and Executive Suites, many offering city views and additional living space. Each room is equipped with modern amenities including high-speed Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and dedicated work areas, making it suitable for both short stays and business travel.

Dining at Golden Tulip Westlands Nairobi is diverse and flexible, with several on-site venues catering to different preferences. Temptation Restaurant operates 24 hours a day, serving international cuisine, while Tulip Restaurant offers a variety of dishes along with a popular breakfast buffet. Café Lungo, located at the lobby level, provides a relaxed setting for coffee, quick meals, and informal meetings.

One of the hotel’s standout features is its rooftop leisure area, which includes an outdoor swimming pool and the Volcano Sports Bar. This elevated space offers panoramic views of the Nairobi skyline, creating a lively and social atmosphere, particularly in the evenings. Guests should note that the rooftop bar can be active on weekends, contributing to a vibrant nightlife feel within the hotel.

Wellness facilities include a fully equipped fitness centre, as well as a sauna and steam room, allowing guests to maintain their fitness routines and relax during their stay. The hotel also caters to business needs with multiple meeting and conference rooms, many of which benefit from natural daylight and modern presentation facilities.

Security is a strong focus at the property, with gated access and 24-hour security ensuring a safe environment for guests. Additional services such as airport transfers (available for a fee) and professional staff support further enhance the overall experience.

The atmosphere at Golden Tulip Westlands Nairobi is modern, energetic, and business-friendly, with consistent praise for its attentive staff and convenient location. While some guests mention minor considerations such as noise from the rooftop area or bathroom design details, the overall experience remains highly rated.

For travelers searching for hotels in Westlands Nairobi, 4-star hotels near Sarit Centre, or modern business hotels in Nairobi, Golden Tulip Westlands Nairobi offers a well-balanced stay combining comfort, accessibility, and vibrant city views.
items.name: Golden Tulip Westlands Nairobi

items.contentHtml:
Hyatt Regency Nairobi Westlands is a newly opened 5-star luxury hotel located along Muthithi Road in the heart of Nairobi’s vibrant Westlands district. Officially launched in January 2025, it marks the flagship debut of the Hyatt Regency brand in Kenya, offering a sophisticated blend of modern hospitality, upscale accommodation, and premium business facilities in one of the city’s most dynamic neighborhoods.

The hotel features 219 contemporary units, including 147 guest rooms and suites alongside 72 fully serviced apartments designed for extended stays. The apartments come equipped with kitchenettes and laundry facilities, making them ideal for long-term guests and business travelers. All rooms are styled with modern interiors and equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi, smart TVs, and comfortable workspaces, ensuring both luxury and functionality.

Dining at Hyatt Regency Nairobi Westlands is diverse and experience-driven, with several distinct outlets catering to different tastes. E.A.T. (Eat All Together), located on the 8th floor, offers a wide selection of African, Indian, Middle Eastern, and Asian cuisine in a lively, family-friendly setting. District 6 provides a sports bar atmosphere ideal for casual dining and live sports viewing, while The Conservatory offers a more relaxed environment for afternoon tea and light refreshments.

The hotel’s wellness and leisure facilities are designed to provide both relaxation and fitness. Guests can enjoy a temperature-controlled swimming pool with a unique half-indoor, half-open-air design, as well as a fully equipped 24-hour gym, sauna, and steam room. These amenities cater to both leisure travelers and professionals looking to maintain their routines while traveling.

Hyatt Regency Nairobi Westlands is also a major destination for business and events, featuring nine meeting rooms and over 23,000 square feet of event space. This makes it one of the leading conference and corporate venues in Nairobi, suitable for large-scale meetings, exhibitions, and private events.

Its central Westlands location places guests within walking distance of major shopping and cultural attractions, including Sarit Centre, Westgate Shopping Mall, and the Nairobi National Museum. The hotel is also conveniently accessible from both Wilson Airport and Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, enhancing its appeal for international travelers.

The overall atmosphere is modern, upscale, and globally oriented, reflecting Hyatt’s international standards while incorporating elements suited to Nairobi’s urban lifestyle. It is particularly appealing to business travelers, long-stay guests, and visitors seeking a contemporary luxury experience in a prime location.

For travelers searching for luxury hotels in Westlands Nairobi, new hotels in Nairobi 2025, or 5-star hotels with serviced apartments in Nairobi, Hyatt Regency Nairobi Westlands offers a cutting-edge stay combining comfort, convenience, and world-class amenities.
items.name: Hyatt Regency Nairobi Westlands

items.contentHtml:
Pan Pacific Serviced Suites Nairobi is a 5-star luxury aparthotel located within the prestigious Global Trade Centre (GTC) complex in Westlands. As the Pan Pacific Hotel Group’s first property in Africa, it brings a refined, residence-style hospitality experience to Nairobi, ideal for both short stays and long-term living in one of the city’s most modern mixed-use developments.

The property features 175 elegantly furnished suites ranging from one to four bedrooms, designed to offer the comfort of a private residence with the services of a luxury hotel. Each suite includes floor-to-ceiling windows, private balconies, spacious living and dining areas, and fully equipped kitchenettes complete with washers and dryers. This makes it especially appealing for families, business travelers, and expatriates seeking extended stays in Nairobi.

Guests have access to a wide range of premium amenities designed for both relaxation and productivity. The rooftop swimming pool offers sweeping views of the Westlands skyline, while the fully equipped fitness centre, sauna, and steam room cater to wellness needs. Social and leisure spaces include a residents’ lounge, wine lounge, billiard tables, and a dedicated children’s playground, creating a well-rounded lifestyle environment within the property.

Dining is centered around the on-site Pacific Restaurant, which serves a variety of international dishes in a contemporary setting. Guests can also enjoy in-room breakfast service or casual bites at the poolside snack bar. The direct internal connection to the GTC mall adds significant convenience, providing access to a 24-hour Carrefour supermarket, restaurants, cafés, and essential services just steps away.

For business travelers, the property offers meeting rooms and executive workspaces within select suites, making it a practical choice for those combining work and travel. Its location along Waiyaki Way, near the Nairobi Expressway, ensures quick access to both Westlands business hubs and Jomo Kenyatta International Airport.

Additional services include a 24-hour airport shuttle (available at a surcharge) and a complimentary local shuttle service within a 3-kilometre radius, enhancing mobility around the city. Security within the GTC complex is also a standout feature, with controlled access and modern surveillance systems.

The overall experience is defined by space, privacy, and upscale convenience, with guests frequently praising the modern design, comfort, and location. While occasional service delays have been noted, the property remains one of Nairobi’s top choices for luxury serviced apartments.

For travelers searching for serviced apartments in Westlands Nairobi, luxury aparthotels in Nairobi, or long-stay accommodation in Nairobi with kitchen facilities, Pan Pacific Serviced Suites Nairobi offers a premium, residence-style stay with world-class amenities and unmatched convenience.
items.name: Pan Pacific Serviced Suites Nairobi

items.contentHtml:
Tribe Hotel Nairobi is a luxury 5-star boutique hotel located in the upscale Gigiri diplomatic district, directly adjacent to The Village Market shopping complex. As a member of Design Hotels, it stands out for its bold, contemporary African-inspired design, blending natural stone, rich wood textures, and curated local art to create one of the most visually distinctive hotels in Nairobi.

The hotel features 128 stylish rooms and suites, ranging from Superior and Deluxe rooms to more exclusive Loft Business Suites and high-security Ambassadorial and Presidential suites. Each space is thoughtfully designed with modern amenities such as high-speed Wi-Fi, smart TVs, and elegant finishes, offering both comfort and a strong sense of place rooted in African aesthetics.

Dining at Tribe Hotel is a highlight of the experience, anchored by its signature restaurant, Jiko, which focuses on seasonal, organic, and African-inspired cuisine. Guests can also enjoy drinks and light bites at the rooftop bar or relax at the poolside lounge. Additionally, the hotel’s location provides easy access to popular nearby restaurants within Village Market, including Bang Bang (Thai cuisine) and Hero (Japanese dining), expanding the culinary options available to guests.

Wellness is a key component of the Tribe experience, with the Kaya Spa offering a 10,000-square-foot sanctuary dedicated to relaxation and rejuvenation. Facilities include five treatment rooms, a Rasul chamber, sauna, and a range of massage and skincare therapies. The hotel also features a 24-hour fitness centre and a heated outdoor swimming pool, allowing guests to maintain their wellness routines in a serene setting.

One of the defining aspects of Tribe Hotel is its personalized service, delivered by the “Chieftains,” the hotel’s guest services team. They are known for providing tailored assistance, from arranging transport to recommending local experiences, enhancing the overall guest journey.

Located along Limuru Road in Gigiri, the hotel is within walking distance of Village Market and close to key international hubs such as the United Nations Office at Nairobi. It is approximately 25 kilometres from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, making it both accessible and well-positioned for diplomatic, business, and leisure travelers.

The overall atmosphere is artistic, upscale, and culturally immersive, offering a boutique alternative to more traditional luxury hotels in Nairobi. It is particularly suited for travelers seeking design-led accommodation with a strong local identity.

For those searching for boutique luxury hotels in Nairobi, design hotels in Gigiri, or 5-star hotels near Village Market, Tribe Hotel Nairobi offers a unique and sophisticated stay that blends modern luxury with authentic African character.
items.name: Tribe Hotel

items.contentHtml:
Karen Blixen Coffee Garden & Cottages is a luxury boutique hotel and heritage retreat located in the serene suburb of Karen, Nairobi. Set on the historic grounds of the former coffee estate owned by famed Out of Africa author Karen Blixen, the property offers a unique blend of colonial-era charm, lush gardens, and modern comfort—making it one of Nairobi’s most atmospheric and romantic stays.

The hotel sits on five acres of beautifully landscaped gardens filled with mature trees, birdlife, and tranquil walking paths, creating a peaceful escape from the city. At its heart is the historic Swedo House, built between 1906 and 1908 as a hunting lodge, which now serves as the reception area and anchors the property’s rich historical identity.

Accommodation is intimate and exclusive, with just 13 uniquely designed units that emphasize privacy and character. Guests can choose from one-bedroom cottages, spacious family cottages, classic rooms, and a signature honeymoon suite featuring two fireplaces. Each unit includes elegant interiors, private verandas, fireplaces for cooler Nairobi evenings, and modern amenities such as free Wi-Fi. The overall design preserves the colonial aesthetic while incorporating contemporary luxury.

Dining is a standout experience at Hattons Lounge, the on-site restaurant named after Denys Finch Hatton. The restaurant offers a refined farm-to-table menu, with dishes crafted from fresh, locally sourced ingredients. Guests can dine indoors or enjoy al fresco meals in the gardens, making it a popular destination not only for hotel guests but also for visitors seeking one of the best garden dining experiences in Nairobi.

The property also features a heated swimming pool, ideal for relaxation after a day of exploring, as well as quiet garden spaces perfect for reading, bird watching, or unwinding. The tranquil environment makes it especially popular for couples, honeymooners, and travelers looking for a calm, nature-filled stay.

Its location along Karen Road places it within walking distance of the Karen Blixen Museum and a short drive from top attractions such as the Giraffe Centre and the David Sheldrick Wildlife Trust. This makes it an excellent base for tourists exploring Nairobi’s wildlife and cultural highlights or those beginning or ending a Kenyan safari.

The overall atmosphere is elegant, historic, and deeply immersive, offering a rare combination of heritage, privacy, and luxury. Guests often highlight the peaceful setting, personalized service, and unique sense of place that sets it apart from larger city hotels.

For travelers searching for boutique hotels in Karen Nairobi, romantic hotels in Nairobi, or luxury stays near Karen Blixen Museum, Karen Blixen Coffee Garden & Cottages offers a timeless and tranquil experience rooted in Kenya’s rich history.
items.name: Karen Blixen Coffee Garden & Cottages

items.contentHtml:
Mercure Nairobi Upper Hill is a contemporary 4-star hotel located in Nairobi’s central financial district, Upper Hill. Positioned along Longonot Road, the hotel offers a strategic location for business travelers, with easy access to major corporate offices, embassies, and key transport routes, including a short 15-minute drive to Jomo Kenyatta International Airport (JKIA).

The hotel features 44 modern and well-appointed rooms designed for comfort and efficiency. Each room includes high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, satellite TV, and tea and coffee-making facilities, making it ideal for both short business trips and extended stays. The design is clean and functional, with a focus on practicality for professionals working in Nairobi’s business hub.

Dining at Mercure Nairobi Upper Hill is centered around two main venues. Kahawa Restaurant offers all-day dining with a menu that blends local Kenyan flavors and international cuisine, while the Alabaster Lounge provides a relaxed setting for light snacks, coffee, and evening drinks. These spaces are designed to cater to both casual dining and informal business meetings.

The hotel also offers a range of wellness and leisure facilities, including a heated outdoor swimming pool, a fully equipped fitness centre, and spa amenities such as a sauna and steam room. Guests should note that some of these facilities may be shared with the adjacent Pullman Hotel, which expands the available amenities while maintaining a high standard of service.

A standout feature of Mercure Nairobi Upper Hill is its focus on business and co-working solutions. The property houses WOJO, a modern co-working space offering private offices, shared desks, and collaborative areas, making it a strong choice for digital nomads, entrepreneurs, and corporate travelers. In addition, the hotel provides extensive meeting and conference facilities suitable for corporate events, workshops, and seminars.

Sustainability is an important part of the hotel’s operations. It is Safe Hotels certified and implements eco-friendly practices such as sourcing a significant portion of its food locally, aligning with global hospitality sustainability standards.

The overall atmosphere is professional, modern, and business-oriented, making it particularly appealing to corporate travelers seeking convenience, connectivity, and comfort in Nairobi’s financial district.

For travelers searching for business hotels in Upper Hill Nairobi, 4-star hotels near Nairobi CBD, or hotels with co-working spaces in Nairobi, Mercure Nairobi Upper Hill offers a smart, efficient, and well-connected stay tailored to modern professionals.
items.name: Mercure Nairobi Upper Hill

items.contentHtml:
Broadwalk Residency Nairobi is a 5-star luxury serviced apartment complex located on Ojijo Road in the Westlands/Parklands area. Set within the modern Broadwalk Mall, it offers a seamless “live, work, and stay” experience, combining upscale residential comfort with direct access to shopping, dining, and essential services—making it ideal for both business and leisure travelers.

The property features 70 fully furnished and serviced apartments, ranging from stylish studio units to spacious one, two, and three-bedroom apartments, as well as premium penthouses. Each unit is designed with contemporary interiors and includes separate living spaces, fully equipped kitchens, and high-speed Wi-Fi, providing the flexibility and comfort of a private residence with hotel-level services.

Wellness and leisure facilities are a major highlight at Broadwalk Residency. Guests can enjoy a heated infinity swimming pool with skyline views, a fully equipped fitness centre, and relaxing spa amenities including a sauna and steam rooms. These features make it a strong choice for long-stay guests who value both comfort and lifestyle amenities.

One of the biggest advantages of staying at Broadwalk Residency is its direct integration with Broadwalk Mall. Guests have immediate access to a Naivas supermarket, a variety of restaurants (including Asian, Ethiopian, and vegetarian options), cafés, and a food court. This convenience makes everyday living effortless, especially for extended stays or family travel.

The property also caters well to business travelers, offering executive boardrooms, a ballroom for events, and reliable high-speed internet throughout. Additional services include a 24-hour front desk, concierge services, daily housekeeping, and airport transfers available at a surcharge.

Its central location places guests within walking distance of key attractions such as the Nairobi National Museum and Snake Park, while also being close to major business districts in Westlands and Upper Hill. The property is approximately 7 km from Wilson Airport and about a 30-minute drive from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport.

Guest experience at Broadwalk Residency is consistently rated highly, with visitors praising the spacious apartments, cleanliness, security, and convenience of the attached mall. While some guests note slightly longer check-in procedures due to strict security protocols, this is often seen as part of the property’s strong safety standards.

The overall atmosphere is modern, secure, and residential, offering a quieter and more private alternative to traditional hotels while still delivering luxury-level service.

For travelers searching for serviced apartments in Westlands Nairobi, luxury apartments near Nairobi National Museum, or long-stay accommodation in Nairobi with mall access, Broadwalk Residency Nairobi offers a premium and highly convenient living experience.
items.name: Broadwalk Residency

items.contentHtml:
Acacia Tree Lodge Nairobi is a boutique 4-star eco-luxury lodge located in the tranquil Karen suburb, offering a unique blend of rustic elegance, personalized hospitality, and meaningful social impact. With just 15 rooms, the lodge provides an intimate and peaceful retreat surrounded by lush greenery, making it ideal for travelers seeking a quiet escape from the city while staying close to Nairobi’s top attractions.

What truly sets Acacia Tree Lodge apart is its “luxury with a purpose” model. The lodge operates as a non-profit, donating 100% of its profits to community projects in Kibera through the New Hope Initiative. Guest stays directly contribute to funding primary education and empowering women-led businesses, making it one of the most socially impactful places to stay in Nairobi.

The lodge’s design reflects a rustic yet refined aesthetic, with interiors crafted from locally sourced leather, wood, and stone. Each room is thoughtfully designed to create a warm, natural atmosphere, complemented by premium mattresses, 400-thread-count linens, and organic toiletries. Accommodation options range from single and double rooms to spacious triple rooms and the exclusive Karibuni Suite, which features a separate living area, fireplace, kitchenette, and garden views.

Dining is centered around Zeke’s Café, the on-site restaurant offering a diverse menu that includes African, American, and Indian cuisine. Most stays include a complimentary continental or buffet breakfast, enjoyed in a relaxed garden setting. The absence of televisions in rooms is a deliberate choice, encouraging guests to disconnect and embrace the calm, nature-focused environment.

Amenities at the lodge include free high-speed Wi-Fi, 24-hour security, a peaceful garden, a children’s playground, and free on-site parking. Additional services such as airport transfers, laundry, and assistance with local transport arrangements ensure a comfortable and hassle-free stay.

The lodge’s location on Marula Lane offers excellent accessibility via the Southern Bypass, with Wilson Airport approximately 20 minutes away and Jomo Kenyatta International Airport about 30 minutes by car. It is also ideally positioned near some of Nairobi’s most popular attractions, including the Karen Blixen Museum, Giraffe Centre, and the David Sheldrick Wildlife Trust, as well as shopping destinations like The Hub Karen and The Galleria.

The overall experience at Acacia Tree Lodge is peaceful, purposeful, and deeply authentic, appealing to travelers who value sustainability, community impact, and a more personal connection to their destination.

For those searching for boutique eco hotels in Karen Nairobi, socially responsible hotels in Nairobi, or quiet nature lodges near Nairobi attractions, Acacia Tree Lodge Nairobi offers a meaningful and memorable stay where comfort meets impact.
items.name: Acacia Tree Lodge

items.contentHtml:
Sankara Nairobi, Autograph Collection is a contemporary 5-star boutique hotel located in the heart of Westlands, Nairobi’s premier commercial and nightlife district. As part of Marriott’s Autograph Collection, the hotel is known for its bold design, creative flair, and personalized service, offering a stylish urban retreat for both business and leisure travelers.

The hotel features approximately 156–168 elegantly designed rooms and suites, each blending modern luxury with warm African-inspired touches. Guests can expect premium amenities such as marble bathrooms, rain showers, high-speed Wi-Fi, and refined walnut wood finishes. The rooms are designed to balance comfort with sophistication, catering to travelers seeking a high-end but character-driven stay.

One of Sankara’s standout features is its rooftop experience, which includes a heated rooftop swimming pool and the iconic Sarabi Rooftop Bar. This space offers panoramic views of Nairobi’s skyline and serves tapas-style cuisine and signature cocktails, making it a popular destination for both hotel guests and the city’s social crowd.

Dining at Sankara Nairobi is diverse and upscale. Graze Steakhouse delivers a New York-style dining experience with premium cuts of meat and fine wines, while Artisan Restaurant offers global cuisine through buffet and à la carte menus in a contemporary setting. The Gallery, a gourmet wine bar and delicatessen, provides a more relaxed atmosphere for light bites, coffee, and curated wine selections.

Wellness and business facilities are equally impressive. The hotel includes a fully equipped fitness centre, a full-service spa offering a range of treatments, and modern meeting and event spaces such as the Woodvale Ballroom.
