Dining is one of the hotel’s strongest highlights, with several specialized restaurants offering diverse culinary experiences. Curry Flavors serves authentic Indian cuisine, featuring both North and South Indian dishes in a refined setting. Umami Oriental focuses on Asian fusion, including sushi and Chinese cuisine, providing a modern and vibrant dining experience. Bonhomie offers continental gourmet dishes in an elegant space with a terrace, making it ideal for business lunches and formal dining.

For a more relaxed and social setting, the Aer Lounge rooftop bar provides cocktails, light bites, and panoramic sunset views over Nairobi’s skyline, making it a popular spot for evening relaxation and social gatherings.

The hotel also offers a range of convenient guest services, including 24-hour room service, free high-speed Wi-Fi, valet parking, and airport shuttle services available upon request. These features ensure a smooth and comfortable experience for both local and international guests.

Location is a key advantage for The Concord Hotel & Suites. Situated in Parklands, it offers easy access to major commercial areas, shopping centres, and international organizations. Its proximity to Westlands and the United Nations offices makes it particularly attractive for business travelers and diplomats.

In terms of pricing, the hotel offers competitive rates within the luxury category. Nightly rates typically start from around KES 12,000, depending on the room type and season, making it a strong value option compared to other 5-star hotels in Nairobi.

The overall atmosphere at The Concord Hotel & Suites Nairobi is modern, elegant, and refined, with a strong emphasis on comfort, dining, and wellness. Guests frequently appreciate the spacious rooms, diverse dining options, and convenient location.

For travelers searching for luxury hotels in Parklands Nairobi, 5-star hotels near Westlands, or hotels with diverse dining options in Nairobi, The Concord Hotel & Suites stands out as a stylish and well-rounded destination offering both value and sophistication.
slug.name: The Concord Hotel and Suites

slug.contentHtml:
Novotel Nairobi Westlands is a modern 4-star hotel located along Lower Kabete Road in the heart of Nairobi’s vibrant Westlands business district. Opened in November 2024, the hotel is one of the newest additions to Nairobi’s hospitality scene, offering contemporary design, family-friendly services, and a versatile experience tailored for both business and leisure travelers.

Strategically positioned just steps away from Sarit Centre and within walking distance of Westgate Shopping Mall, Novotel Nairobi Westlands provides unmatched convenience for guests looking to stay close to shopping, dining, and corporate hubs in the city.

The hotel features 347 contemporary rooms and suites, designed with a clean, modern aesthetic and spacious layouts. Room categories include Superior Rooms (approximately 36 sqm), Executive Rooms (around 41 sqm), and one-bedroom suites that offer additional space and comfort. Each room is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi, comfortable bedding, and functional workspaces, making it suitable for both relaxation and productivity.

A standout feature of Novotel Nairobi Westlands is its strong focus on family-friendly hospitality. Through the Novotel Family Promise, up to two children under the age of 16 can stay for free when sharing a room with their parents, making the hotel an attractive option for families traveling to Nairobi.

The hotel offers a range of premium amenities designed to enhance the guest experience. These include a rooftop heated swimming pool with panoramic views of the city, a fully equipped 24-hour fitness centre, and the In Balance Spa, which provides relaxation and wellness treatments in a calm and modern setting.

Dining at Novotel Nairobi Westlands is diverse and experience-driven, with four distinct venues catering to different tastes. Gemma’s Italian Kitchen & Bar offers authentic Italian cuisine in a stylish all-day dining setting. Trunk n Tandoor, a rooftop Indian-inspired restaurant and sky lounge, delivers flavorful dishes alongside sunset views of Nairobi’s skyline. The Social Hub provides a casual space for Kenyan coffee, pastries, and informal meetings, while the Pool Bar offers cocktails and light bites in a relaxed rooftop environment.

For corporate and event needs, the hotel is well-equipped with 13 meeting rooms featuring natural daylight and modern audiovisual technology. The property also includes a large ballroom capable of hosting up to 300–350 guests, complemented by a foyer and outdoor networking spaces, making it suitable for conferences, weddings, and business events.

The location of Novotel Nairobi Westlands is one of its strongest advantages. Guests have immediate access to Sarit Centre and are just a short walk from Westgate Mall, while key attractions such as the Nairobi National Museum and Karura Forest are located nearby. The hotel also offers convenient access to major roads connecting to Jomo Kenyatta International Airport.

In terms of pricing, Novotel Nairobi Westlands is positioned in the upper mid-range category. Nightly rates typically start from approximately KES 17,000 to KES 20,000, often including breakfast, offering strong value for a newly built hotel with modern facilities and a prime location.

The overall atmosphere is contemporary, lively, and versatile, appealing to business travelers, families, and modern leisure guests. Visitors often appreciate the new facilities, spacious rooms, and convenient location, making it a strong competitor among Westlands hotels.

For those searching for new hotels in Westlands Nairobi, family-friendly hotels near Sarit Centre, or modern business hotels in Nairobi, Novotel Nairobi Westlands stands out as a fresh and well-rounded destination offering comfort, convenience, and contemporary style.
slug.name: Novotel Nairobi Westlands

slug.contentHtml:
Glam Hotel Nairobi is a stylish boutique hotel located at the junction of General Mathenge Road and Peponi Road in the vibrant Westlands district. Known for its eclectic African-inspired interiors and modern comfort, the hotel offers a convenient and contemporary stay within walking distance of major shopping and lifestyle destinations such as Sarit Centre and Westgate Mall.

Positioned in one of Nairobi’s most sought-after neighborhoods, Glam Hotel combines accessibility with a relaxed boutique atmosphere, making it a popular choice for both business travelers and leisure guests.

The hotel features a variety of well-designed rooms tailored to different guest needs. Options include Deluxe Rooms, Twin Rooms, and Superior Rooms with kitchenettes, many of which are equipped with work desks for added functionality. The interiors reflect a blend of modern design and African artistic elements, creating a warm and inviting environment. Rooms are spacious, clean, and designed for both short and extended stays.

Glam Hotel Nairobi offers a range of essential amenities that enhance the guest experience. These include free high-speed Wi-Fi, a fitness centre, and secure private parking. The hotel also caters to business travelers with a conference room located on the 9th floor, which can accommodate up to 30 people and offers natural lighting along with city views, making it suitable for meetings and small corporate events.

Dining is one of the highlights of the hotel, with multiple venues providing diverse culinary experiences. Glam Café & Restaurant, located on the 9th floor, serves a full English buffet breakfast along with a variety of international dishes throughout the day. For guests seeking specialized cuisine, Feaston Indian Restaurant is well-regarded for its quality Indian dishes, offering both lunch and dinner options in a refined setting.

The hotel’s standout feature is the Glam Rooftop Bar & Restaurant, located on the 10th floor. This elevated venue offers panoramic views of Nairobi’s skyline, curated cocktails, and a vibrant atmosphere, making it a popular spot for evening relaxation, social gatherings, and dining with a view.

The location of Glam Hotel Nairobi is one of its strongest advantages. Situated in Westlands, it provides easy access to shopping malls, restaurants, offices, and entertainment venues, all within walking distance. This central positioning makes it ideal for guests who want to explore Nairobi without relying heavily on transport.

The hotel operates with a 24-hour front desk, ensuring flexibility and convenience for guests arriving at any time. Its overall atmosphere is modern, lively, and comfortable, appealing to travelers looking for a boutique experience with strong location benefits.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the clean and spacious rooms, friendly service, and excellent location. However, some guests have noted occasional noise on lower floors and limited breakfast variety, though these do not significantly impact the overall positive experience.

For travelers searching for boutique hotels in Westlands Nairobi, hotels near Sarit Centre, or affordable modern stays in Nairobi, Glam Hotel Nairobi stands out as a stylish and well-located option offering comfort, convenience, and a vibrant rooftop experience.
slug.name: Glam Hotel Nairobi

slug.contentHtml:
Kates Hotel & Residence Nairobi, also known as Kates Apartments, is a well-established 3-star aparthotel located along School Lane, off Karuna Road in the heart of Westlands. Known for combining hotel-style services with the comfort and privacy of fully furnished apartments, the property is a popular choice for both short-term stays and long-term business accommodation in Nairobi.

Set within a serene garden environment, Kates Hotel & Residence offers a calm and secure atmosphere despite being just steps away from some of Westlands’ busiest commercial and shopping hubs. Its proximity to Sarit Centre and other key locations makes it highly convenient for both local and international travelers.

The property features 98 rooms and serviced apartments, designed to cater to a variety of guest needs. Accommodation options include Deluxe Rooms, Studio Apartments, One- and Two-Bedroom Units, and larger Family Suites, many of which are equipped with fully fitted kitchens and dining areas. The Penthouse suite, measuring approximately 1,184 square feet, offers a more spacious and luxurious living option for extended stays or guests seeking additional comfort.

Rooms are designed to balance functionality and comfort, with features such as private balconies, work desks, and modern furnishings. Some Deluxe Rooms also include Jacuzzis, adding a touch of luxury to the overall experience.

Kates Hotel & Residence Nairobi offers a wide range of wellness and leisure amenities. Guests can enjoy a heated outdoor swimming pool, a wood-fired sauna, a steam room, and a hot tub, creating a relaxing environment for unwinding. A fully equipped gym is also available for guests looking to maintain their fitness routines.

Dining at the property includes an on-site restaurant that serves a variety of cuisines, including African, Indian, and European dishes, catering to diverse tastes. A poolside bar provides a casual setting for drinks and cocktails, enhancing the overall leisure experience.

For business travelers, the hotel offers a conference room, a business centre, and high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the property. These facilities make it suitable for meetings, workshops, and corporate stays. Additional services include a 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping, laundry services, and airport shuttle services available at an extra charge.

Location is one of the strongest advantages of Kates Hotel & Residence. Situated just a 2-minute walk from Sarit Centre, the property offers easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment options. It is also approximately 15 to 20 minutes from Wilson Airport, making it convenient for both domestic and international travel.

Guest reviews consistently highlight the warm and welcoming staff, the quiet and secure environment, and the excellent central location. While some feedback suggests that certain units may benefit from updates to furniture or plumbing, the overall experience remains highly rated, with strong scores across major booking platforms.

The atmosphere at Kates Hotel & Residence Nairobi is relaxed, residential, and practical, making it particularly appealing to long-stay guests, families, and business travelers who value space, convenience, and affordability.

For those searching for serviced apartments in Westlands Nairobi, affordable long-stay accommodation near Sarit Centre, or family-friendly hotels in Nairobi, Kates Hotel & Residence stands out as a reliable and well-located option offering comfort, flexibility, and strong value.
slug.name: Kates Hotel & Residence

slug.contentHtml:
West Wood Hotel Nairobi, also known as West Wood Boutique Hotel, is a 4-star boutique property located along Eldama Ravine Road in the Westlands suburb. Uniquely positioned at the edge of Karura Forest, the hotel offers a rare blend of nature, tranquility, and city convenience, making it one of the most peaceful stays within Nairobi’s bustling business district.

Surrounded by greenery and fresh highland air, West Wood Hotel provides a serene, forest-inspired atmosphere while remaining just minutes away from Westlands’ commercial hubs, shopping centres, and dining spots. This balance makes it ideal for both business travelers and leisure guests seeking a calm escape without leaving the city.

The hotel features 30 well-appointed superior and executive rooms, designed with custom-made furniture, king-size beds, and large windows that maximize natural light and offer views of either the forest or Nairobi’s skyline. The interiors reflect a warm, boutique style, combining comfort with subtle luxury to create an intimate and relaxing environment.

Dining at West Wood Hotel is centered around the Westwood Restaurant, which serves a variety of continental and Asian-inspired cuisine in a refined setting. Guests can also unwind at the Forest Bar, a cozy space ideal for drinks and casual meetings, or enjoy refreshments at the poolside bar, which complements the hotel’s outdoor leisure experience.

The hotel offers a range of facilities designed to enhance both relaxation and productivity. Guests have access to an outdoor swimming pool, a landscaped garden with a sun terrace, and free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the property. Secure on-site parking is also available, adding convenience for guests traveling by car.

For corporate and social events, West Wood Hotel provides four modern meeting rooms capable of accommodating up to 200 participants. These spaces are suitable for conferences, workshops, weddings, and private events, supported by professional service and a quiet environment that encourages focus and engagement.

The location is one of the hotel’s most distinctive advantages. Situated off Peponi Road, it is close to key destinations such as The Village Market, Westgate Shopping Mall (approximately 1.6 km away), and the Banana Hill Art Gallery. The hotel is also conveniently located about 7.4 km from Wilson Airport and approximately 16 km (10 miles) from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, making it accessible for both domestic and international travelers.

The overall guest experience at West Wood Hotel Nairobi is highly rated, particularly for its friendly and attentive staff, spacious rooms, and peaceful environment. Guests often highlight the unique experience of staying near Karura Forest, with occasional sightings of monkeys adding to the natural charm. Some feedback notes that certain interior areas may feel slightly dim and that Wi-Fi or service can occasionally slow during peak periods, though this does not significantly detract from the overall experience.

The atmosphere is quiet, green, and boutique, appealing to travelers who value privacy, nature, and a slower pace within the city. It is especially suited for couples, business travelers, and guests looking for a unique stay close to nature.

For those searching for boutique hotels near Karura Forest, quiet hotels in Westlands Nairobi, or nature-inspired stays in Nairobi, West Wood Hotel Nairobi stands out as a distinctive and peaceful option offering comfort, charm, and a unique forest-side experience.
slug.name: West Wood Hotel

slug.contentHtml:
Executive Residency by Best Western Nairobi is an award-winning 4-star apartment hotel located in the leafy and upscale Riverside neighborhood. Designed for both short-term business travelers and extended family stays, the property offers a refined blend of hotel convenience and residential comfort, making it one of the top serviced apartment options in Nairobi.

Set within a quiet and secure environment off Riverside Drive, the hotel provides a peaceful retreat while maintaining close proximity to Westlands, the Central Business District, and key lifestyle destinations.

The property features 48 fully furnished one- and two-bedroom apartments, each thoughtfully designed to provide a home-like living experience. Every unit includes a fully equipped kitchen fitted with a microwave, refrigerator, and stove, as well as a separate living and dining area. Additional conveniences such as a washer and dryer and private balconies make the apartments ideal for long stays and family accommodation.

The interiors are modern, spacious, and functional, offering a comfortable environment for both relaxation and productivity. This setup makes the property particularly appealing to expatriates, business professionals, and guests relocating or staying in Nairobi for extended periods.

One of the standout features of Executive Residency is its rooftop wellness and leisure area. Guests can enjoy an indoor heated swimming pool and a 24-hour fitness centre, both offering panoramic views of Nairobi’s skyline. These facilities create a premium lifestyle experience within a private and tranquil setting.

Dining is centered around The Grove Restaurant, located on the rooftop. The restaurant provides an all-day dining experience featuring a mix of local and international cuisine, complemented by a bar and lounge area. The elevated setting enhances the dining experience, making it suitable for both casual meals and business meetings.

For corporate needs, the hotel offers a range of business services including high-speed Wi-Fi, a business centre, and meeting spaces such as the Slate Meeting Room, which is suitable for small conferences and professional gatherings.

Additional guest services include daily housekeeping, a 24-hour front desk, and airport shuttle services available at an additional cost (approximately USD 40 one way). These services ensure a seamless and comfortable stay for both local and international guests.

The location of Executive Residency by Best Western Nairobi is one of its key advantages. Situated along Riverside Grove, it is close to major attractions such as the Nairobi Arboretum, Westgate Shopping Mall, and the Nairobi National Museum. The area offers easy access to both business districts and leisure spots, making it highly convenient for a variety of travelers.

In terms of pricing, the hotel is positioned within the upper mid-range segment. Nightly rates typically range between KES 17,900 and KES 21,200, depending on the apartment type and season. Business packages are occasionally available, offering competitive rates for corporate travelers.

The overall atmosphere is modern, quiet, and residential, with a strong emphasis on comfort, privacy, and long-stay convenience. Guests frequently appreciate the spacious apartments, cleanliness, and peaceful environment, making it a reliable choice for extended stays.

For travelers searching for serviced apartments in Riverside Nairobi, long-stay hotels near Westlands, or family-friendly apartment hotels in Nairobi, Executive Residency by Best Western Nairobi stands out as a premium option offering space, convenience, and a home-away-from-home experience.
slug.name: Executive Residency By Best Western Nairobi

slug.contentHtml:
Weston Hotel Nairobi is an upscale 4-star hotel located along Lang’ata Road, directly opposite Wilson Airport. Known for its classic design, spacious interiors, and strong focus on business and conferencing facilities, the hotel offers a convenient and comfortable stay for both corporate and leisure travelers. Its strategic location places guests just minutes from Nairobi’s Central Business District and close to key attractions such as the David Sheldrick Wildlife Trust.

Blending traditional elegance with modern functionality, Weston Hotel has established itself as a reliable choice for business meetings, events, and city stays within a well-connected part of Nairobi.

The hotel features 119 well-appointed rooms and suites, designed to provide both comfort and space. Accommodation options include Executive Rooms (approximately 50 sqm), Deluxe Suites (around 85 sqm), and the expansive Presidential Suite (250 sqm), which offers a high level of luxury and privacy. Rooms are fitted with modern amenities, comfortable bedding, and spacious layouts, making them suitable for both short stays and extended visits.

Dining at Weston Hotel Nairobi is diverse, with three international restaurants and two bars offering a wide selection of cuisines. Guests can enjoy African and American-inspired dishes, alongside options catering to vegan, dairy-free, and halal dietary preferences. The variety of dining choices makes the hotel suitable for both casual meals and formal dining experiences.

The hotel is a major destination for conferences and events in Nairobi. It offers between 14 and 16 function rooms, along with a 24-hour business centre, making it ideal for corporate meetings, workshops, and large-scale conferences. The property also features lush gardens, which are often used for weddings and outdoor events, adding a scenic and elegant touch to special occasions.

Wellness and leisure facilities at Weston Hotel Nairobi are designed to provide relaxation and balance. Guests have access to a state-of-the-art gym, a spa and wellness centre offering services such as Thai massages and hydrotherapy, as well as a sauna. The hotel also features an outdoor swimming pool with a sun deck, providing a comfortable space for relaxation.

The location is one of the hotel’s key strengths. Situated directly opposite Wilson Airport, it is highly convenient for domestic travel and safari connections. It is also just a 5-minute drive from Nairobi’s CBD, making it suitable for business travelers. Nearby attractions such as the David Sheldrick Wildlife Trust and Nairobi National Park further enhance its appeal for leisure guests.

Guest reviews consistently highlight the impeccable customer service, spacious rooms, and convenient location. Many visitors also appreciate the variety offered in the breakfast buffet. However, some recent feedback suggests that certain areas of the property may benefit from modernization to match newer hotels in Nairobi.

The overall atmosphere at Weston Hotel Nairobi is classic, spacious, and business-oriented, with a strong emphasis on service, events, and accessibility. It is particularly well-suited for corporate travelers, conference attendees, and guests looking for a well-located hotel near Wilson Airport.

For those searching for hotels near Wilson Airport Nairobi, conference hotels in Nairobi, or business-friendly hotels near Nairobi CBD, Weston Hotel Nairobi stands out as a dependable and strategically located option offering comfort, space, and strong event facilities.
slug.name: Weston Hotel

slug.contentHtml:
Clarence House Nairobi is a well-established 3-star aparthotel located along School Lane in the heart of Westlands. Known for its spacious serviced apartments and signature heated rooftop swimming pool, the property offers a comfortable blend of residential living and hotel-style convenience, making it a popular choice for both short stays and extended visits in Nairobi.

Situated just a few minutes from key business and lifestyle hubs, Clarence House provides a central yet relaxed environment ideal for business travelers, families, and long-stay guests seeking both accessibility and comfort.

The property features 48 fully serviced apartments, ranging from Executive Studio Rooms to Two-Bedroom Superior Suites. Each unit is designed with a focus on space and independence, offering a fully equipped kitchen, dining area, and living space. A unique feature of many units is the inclusion of a private indoor hot tub, adding a touch of luxury to the residential experience.

Dining at Clarence House Nairobi is centered around the Cloud 9 Rooftop Restaurant, a standout feature of the property. The restaurant serves a wide variety of cuisines including African, British, Indian, and Italian dishes. With a fully stocked bar and elevated positioning, it offers panoramic views of Nairobi’s skyline, creating an ideal setting for both casual dining and evening relaxation.

The hotel’s wellness facilities are among its most attractive features. Guests can enjoy a year-round heated rooftop swimming pool, making it usable in all weather conditions. Additional facilities include a well-equipped fitness centre with professional trainers, a sauna, a steam room, and a spa offering treatments such as deep-tissue and hot stone massages. These amenities provide a well-rounded experience focused on relaxation and wellness.

For business travelers, Clarence House Nairobi offers three modern conference suites suitable for small to medium-sized meetings. These spaces are equipped with high-speed internet and presentation facilities, making them ideal for corporate use.

The location of Clarence House is one of its strongest advantages. Positioned in Westlands, it is within walking distance of major shopping and commercial centres such as Sarit Centre and Westgate Mall. It is also located next to VFS Global Nairobi, making it especially convenient for travelers handling visa applications. The property is approximately 3.8 kilometres from the Nairobi National Museum and about a 22-minute drive from Wilson Airport, offering good connectivity across the city.

In terms of pricing, Clarence House Nairobi is positioned within the affordable mid-range category. Nightly rates typically range between KES 8,000 and KES 14,000, depending on the apartment type and season, offering strong value for the space and amenities provided.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the spacious apartments, heated rooftop pool, and excellent location as key strengths. The rooftop restaurant and wellness facilities also receive positive feedback. While the property may not offer the ultra-modern finish of newer developments, it remains a reliable and comfortable option for extended stays.

The overall atmosphere is relaxed, residential, and practical, appealing to guests who prefer a home-like environment with added hotel conveniences.

For travelers searching for serviced apartments in Westlands Nairobi, affordable long-stay hotels near Sarit Centre, or hotels with rooftop pools in Nairobi, Clarence House Nairobi stands out as a well-rounded option offering comfort, space, and central convenience.
slug.name: Clarence House Nairobi

slug.contentHtml:
Pax Manor Muthaiga is a refined 5-star luxury heritage hotel located along Muthaiga Road in one of Nairobi’s most exclusive neighborhoods. Originally a colonial-era retreat, the estate has been thoughtfully reimagined into an elegant boutique sanctuary that blends history, luxury, and nature. Overlooking the lush expanse of Karura Forest, the property offers a serene and intimate escape just minutes from the city.

Set within beautifully landscaped gardens, Pax Manor Muthaiga delivers a distinctive hospitality experience defined by privacy, sophistication, and timeless charm. It stands out as one of Nairobi’s most unique boutique stays, appealing to travelers seeking exclusivity and character rather than large-scale luxury hotels.

The accommodation at Pax Manor is both limited and curated, enhancing its boutique appeal. The main Manor House features six historical chambers, each designed to reflect the property’s heritage while incorporating modern comfort. Complementing these are the Msitu Tented Cottages, which offer a unique blend of luxury and adventure, allowing guests to stay immersed in nature while enjoying high-end amenities. These accommodations provide an intimate, personalized experience rarely found in traditional hotels.

Dining at Pax Manor is a highlight of the guest experience. The Royal 58 Restaurant offers a refined menu combining international and African cuisine, served in a setting that overlooks the gardens. The restaurant is particularly well-known for its luxury Sunday brunch, which features live music, a curated buffet, and an elegant social atmosphere, making it a popular destination even for non-resident guests.

Wellness and leisure are central to the Pax Manor experience. The Oriki Spa offers a range of therapeutic treatments, including massages, steam rooms, and sauna facilities, designed to promote relaxation and rejuvenation. The property also features a luxurious infinity pool, set within the gardens and offering tranquil views of the surrounding greenery.

A unique addition to the property is the Esquire Cigar & Whisky Lounge, which has gained recognition as one of the finest in Nairobi, offering a curated selection of premium and rare whiskies in an intimate and sophisticated setting. For fitness enthusiasts, the Hermes Fitness Centre provides modern equipment within a private and exclusive environment.

The location of Pax Manor Muthaiga combines exclusivity with accessibility. Situated approximately 4.8 kilometres from the Nairobi National Museum and about a 15-minute drive from the city centre or Wilson Airport, it offers convenient access while maintaining a quiet and secluded atmosphere. The surrounding Muthaiga neighborhood is known for its greenery, security, and proximity to key diplomatic and residential areas.

The overall guest experience at Pax Manor is defined by luxury, privacy, and attention to detail. Visitors often praise the serene environment, personalized service, and unique setting that blends heritage with modern elegance. As a boutique property, availability is limited, and both accommodation and dining are typically strictly by reservation, reinforcing its exclusive nature.

The atmosphere is intimate, refined, and nature-oriented, making it particularly suitable for couples, luxury travelers, and guests seeking a quiet escape within Nairobi.

For travelers searching for luxury boutique hotels in Muthaiga Nairobi, heritage hotels near Karura Forest, or exclusive retreats in Nairobi, Pax Manor Muthaiga stands out as a distinctive destination offering elegance, privacy, and a truly unique hospitality experience.
slug.name: Pax Manor Muthaiga

slug.contentHtml:
CySuites Apartment Hotel Nairobi is a modern 5-star serviced apartment hotel located along Church Road in the Westlands area. Designed to offer a “home away from home” experience, the property combines the space and independence of residential living with the convenience of hotel services, making it a preferred choice for both short-term stays and extended visits in Nairobi.

Set within a quiet yet central part of Westlands, CySuites provides easy access to major business districts, shopping centres, and dining hubs, while maintaining a relaxed and private atmosphere ideal for long-stay guests.

The property features 40 fully furnished apartments, thoughtfully designed to cater to a range of guest needs. Accommodation options include one-bedroom apartments (approximately 840 sq. ft.), two-bedroom apartments (around 915 sq. ft.), and superior apartments with similar spacious layouts. For guests seeking a more premium experience, the penthouses, measuring approximately 1,679 sq. ft., offer expansive living spaces and elevated comfort.

Each unit is designed for independent living and includes a fully equipped kitchenette with a stovetop, microwave, refrigerator, and cookware, as well as separate living and dining areas. This setup makes CySuites particularly suitable for families, business travelers, and guests planning longer stays in Nairobi.

Dining at CySuites is centered around The Hive Restaurant & Bar, a stylish poolside venue offering a mix of international and Kenyan cuisine. The relaxed setting makes it suitable for both casual meals and social gatherings, enhancing the overall lifestyle experience within the property.

The hotel’s wellness facilities are a key highlight. Guests have access to a heated outdoor swimming pool, a separate children’s pool, and the CyFit Gym, which includes a complimentary fitness instructor. These amenities provide a balanced environment for relaxation and fitness, catering to both residents and visiting guests.

For business and corporate needs, CySuites offers modern meeting spaces equipped with high-speed internet and video conferencing capabilities. These facilities are suitable for small meetings, remote work, and professional gatherings.

Additional conveniences include a 24-hour front desk, free self-parking, and a roundtrip airport shuttle service available at an additional cost (approximately KES 3,500). These services ensure a smooth and comfortable experience for both local and international guests.

In terms of pricing, CySuites Apartment Hotel Nairobi is positioned within the mid-range to upper mid-range segment. Nightly rates typically start from around KES 9,400, depending on the apartment type and season, offering strong value for the space and amenities provided.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the friendly and attentive staff, the cleanliness of the heated pool, and the spaciousness of the apartments as standout features. While some feedback notes that certain units may feel slightly dated, the overall experience remains highly positive, particularly for long-stay guests.

The overall atmosphere at CySuites is modern, quiet, and residential, with a strong emphasis on comfort, space, and convenience. It is especially appealing to business travelers, families, and guests seeking a flexible and home-like stay in Nairobi.

For those searching for serviced apartments in Westlands Nairobi, long-stay accommodation near Nairobi CBD, or apartments with kitchen facilities in Nairobi, CySuites Apartment Hotel stands out as a practical and well-rounded option offering space, comfort, and excellent value.
slug.name: Cysuites Apartment Hotel

slug.contentHtml:
DoubleTree by Hilton Nairobi Hurlingham is a contemporary 4-star hotel located along Ngong Lane, just off Ngong Road, in the Hurlingham/Kilimani area. Known for its modern architectural design and signature warm hospitality—including the iconic DoubleTree welcome cookie—the hotel offers a comfortable and stylish stay for both business and leisure travelers.

Positioned approximately 5 kilometres from Nairobi’s Central Business District, the hotel provides convenient access to key commercial areas while maintaining a quieter, more relaxed atmosphere compared to the city centre.

The hotel features 109 non-smoking rooms and suites, designed with modern finishes and functional layouts. Room options include standard guest rooms in King and Twin configurations, Deluxe Rooms offering additional space (around 33 square metres), and Junior and Penthouse suites for guests seeking a more premium experience. All rooms are equipped with air conditioning, flat-screen TVs, refrigerators, and comfortable bedding, ensuring a relaxed and convenient stay. Accessible rooms are also available, catering to guests with mobility needs.

Dining at DoubleTree by Hilton Nairobi Hurlingham is centered around The Atrium Brasserie, the hotel’s main restaurant. It offers a diverse menu featuring international, Indian, Italian, and Pan-Asian cuisine, making it suitable for both casual dining and business meals. Guests can also enjoy drinks and light bites at the Lounge Bar, which features outdoor seating overlooking the pool, creating a relaxed and social environment.

For leisure and wellness, the hotel offers an outdoor swimming pool and a 24-hour fitness centre, allowing guests to maintain their routines while traveling. These facilities provide a balanced experience between relaxation and productivity.

The hotel is also well-equipped for corporate needs and events. It features a business centre and six meeting rooms, including a ballroom that can accommodate up to 250 guests. These spaces are ideal for conferences, workshops, weddings, and corporate functions, supported by modern technology and professional service.

Additional conveniences include complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, free on-site self-parking, and airport shuttle services available at an additional cost (approximately $30). These features enhance the overall ease and comfort of the guest experience.

The location of DoubleTree by Hilton Nairobi Hurlingham offers excellent connectivity to key attractions and lifestyle destinations. Guests are within walking distance of Prestige Plaza (approximately 6 minutes) and a short drive from Yaya Centre. The hotel is also within a 30-minute drive of major attractions such as Nairobi National Park, the David Sheldrick Wildlife Trust, and the Giraffe Centre, making it suitable for both business and leisure itineraries.

Guest reviews consistently highlight the friendly and professional staff, comfortable rooms, and convenient location. The signature warm cookie welcome is often mentioned as a memorable touch that enhances the overall experience.

The atmosphere at DoubleTree by Hilton Nairobi Hurlingham is modern, welcoming, and professional, appealing to business travelers, couples, and guests seeking a reliable international hotel standard in Nairobi.

For travelers searching for hotels in Kilimani Nairobi, business hotels near Ngong Road, or Hilton hotels in Nairobi, DoubleTree by Hilton Nairobi Hurlingham stands out as a dependable and well-located option offering comfort, convenience, and quality service.
slug.name: DoubleTree by Hilton Nairobi Hurlingham

slug.contentHtml:
Okash City Boutique Hotel Nairobi is a modern 4.5-star boutique hotel located along Muhoho Avenue in the South C area. Known for its contemporary design, strong service standards, and strategic proximity to both Wilson Airport and Jomo Kenyatta International Airport, the hotel offers a convenient and comfortable stay for business travelers, transit guests, and leisure visitors.

Positioned near the Nairobi Expressway, the hotel provides easy access to key parts of the city, including the Central Business District and major attractions, while maintaining a quieter and more relaxed environment compared to central Nairobi.

The hotel features 56 well-designed rooms and suites, ranging from Superior Rooms to Executive Suites. Each room is fitted with king-sized beds, 50-inch LED TVs, high-speed Wi-Fi, and dedicated workspaces, making them suitable for both relaxation and productivity. The interiors are modern, clean, and functional, reflecting a contemporary boutique style.

Dining at Okash City Boutique Hotel offers a diverse culinary experience with an on-site restaurant serving a mix of Indian, local Kenyan, and international cuisine. Guests can also enjoy meals and drinks at the Skyline Lounge, an al fresco dining space that provides a relaxed atmosphere with views of the surrounding area.

A distinctive feature of the hotel is its halal-friendly approach. As a Muslim-owned property, Okash City Boutique Hotel does not serve alcohol, making it a preferred choice for guests seeking a halal-compliant environment while still enjoying upscale amenities.

The hotel’s wellness and recreational facilities enhance its appeal as a lifestyle destination. Guests have access to a heated rooftop swimming pool, a fully equipped fitness centre, as well as a sauna and steam room, offering a balanced experience of relaxation and fitness.

Accessibility is another key strength of the property. The hotel includes wheelchair-accessible entrances and parking, ensuring inclusivity for all guests. Its proximity to major transport routes makes it especially convenient for travelers arriving or departing from Nairobi.

The location is highly strategic. Okash City Boutique Hotel is approximately 1.2 miles from Wilson Airport and offers quick access to the Nairobi Expressway, connecting guests efficiently to Jomo Kenyatta International Airport. It is also close to major landmarks such as the Kenyatta International Convention Centre (KICC) and within reach of attractions like Nairobi National Park and the Nairobi Railway Museum.

In terms of pricing, the hotel is positioned within the mid-range to upper mid-range category. Nightly rates typically start from around KES 12,800, with occasional promotions such as extended-stay offers, providing good value for the level of comfort and amenities offered.

Guest reviews often highlight the clean rooms, friendly staff, and convenient location as key strengths. The halal-friendly environment and modern facilities also make it stand out among boutique hotels in Nairobi.

The overall atmosphere at Okash City Boutique Hotel Nairobi is modern, calm, and professional, appealing to business travelers, families, and guests seeking a comfortable and accessible stay near Nairobi’s transport hubs.

For those searching for hotels in South C Nairobi, halal-friendly hotels in Nairobi, or hotels near Wilson Airport and Nairobi Expressway, Okash City Boutique Hotel stands out as a well-located and thoughtfully designed option offering comfort, convenience, and a modern boutique experience.
slug.name: Okash City Boutique Hotel

slug.contentHtml:
The Social House Nairobi is a distinctive 4-star boutique hotel located along James Gichuru Road in the upscale Lavington neighborhood. Designed as a “thoroughly new kind of house,” the hotel redefines traditional hospitality by focusing on community, creativity, and informal, personable service. It is notably the first hotel in Africa to operate without a traditional reception desk, instead using a smartphone-first approach for check-ins, room access, and guest interaction, creating a seamless and modern guest experience.

The hotel features 83 bedrooms designed around what it calls the “Triple S” philosophy—Simple, Stylish, and Sensible. The rooms are easy to use, visually appealing with natural tones and bold accents, and equipped with practical technology that enhances comfort. All rooms include interactive smart TVs that allow guests to control lighting, temperature, and entertainment, along with thoughtful touches such as freshly roasted Kenyan coffee served with a French press. Room categories include Double or Twin Bedrooms measuring approximately 24 square meters with rainforest showers and smartphone key access, Bigger Bedrooms at 37 square meters overlooking the pool with king-sized beds, and the Biggest Bedrooms at 48 square meters, which offer balconies, bathtubs, and a more spacious, premium experience.

Dining is one of the strongest highlights of The Social House Nairobi, with multiple unique venues that position the hotel as a culinary and social hub. Inca, the rooftop restaurant and bar, offers a vibrant Japanese-Peruvian fusion experience paired with live DJs and a lively atmosphere. Copper provides a more intimate brasserie-style setting focused on open-fire grilling of meats and fish. The Other Room delivers a farm-to-table concept with a Scandinavian-inspired design and is especially popular for its Sunday brunch. At the center of the property is The Living Room, a 24-hour café-bar and coffee roastery that acts as a social gathering space for guests and visitors alike.

The hotel also offers a range of lifestyle and wellness facilities designed to enhance the overall experience. Guests have access to a heated outdoor lap pool, a modern gym known as “The Jim,” and a lush garden space that adds to the relaxed, residential feel of the property. Beyond physical amenities, The Social House curates a rotating calendar of cultural and social events, including art exhibitions, themed brunches, and wine tastings, creating an ever-evolving environment that encourages interaction and community.

For business and creative use, the hotel includes multiple meeting spaces equipped with modern technology such as Samsung electronic flip charts, making it suitable for meetings, workshops, and collaborative sessions. The approach is less corporate and more experience-driven, aligning with the hotel’s overall concept.

The location in Lavington offers a quieter, more refined setting compared to central Nairobi, while still providing convenient access to key areas such as Westlands, Kilimani, and the Central Business District. It is approximately 6 miles from Wilson Airport and within easy reach of major lifestyle and business hubs.

The overall atmosphere at The Social House Nairobi is modern, creative, and community-driven, appealing to travelers who value experience, design, and social interaction. Guests frequently praise the unique concept, stylish interiors, and vibrant dining scene, making it a standout option in Nairobi’s boutique hotel space.

For travelers searching for boutique hotels in Lavington Nairobi, lifestyle hotels with unique experiences, or modern design-driven stays in Nairobi, The Social House Nairobi stands out as one of the most innovative and engaging hospitality destinations in the city.
slug.name: The Social House Nairobi, A Preferred Lifestyle Hotel

slug.contentHtml:
Glee Nairobi is a newly opened 5-star luxury hotel and resort located along the Northern Bypass in the upscale Runda area of Nairobi. Set on eight acres of beautifully landscaped grounds, the property is designed as a true urban oasis, offering a tranquil escape within close proximity to the United Nations offices and Nairobi’s diplomatic district. Its blend of modern luxury, expansive outdoor spaces, and high-end amenities positions it as one of the most ambitious hospitality developments in Nairobi.

The hotel features 211 elegantly designed rooms and suites, catering to both business and leisure travelers seeking comfort and sophistication. Accommodation ranges from stylish standard rooms to expansive luxury suites, with the standout being the Presidential Suite, a 582-square-meter residence complete with its own private pool. Rooms are designed with contemporary finishes, spacious layouts, and large windows that bring in natural light while offering views of the surrounding greenery.

One of the most distinctive features of Glee Nairobi is its unique elevated skywalk, a wooden pathway suspended above a nature grove within the property. This experience adds a rare nature-immersive element to the hotel, allowing guests to explore the grounds from a different perspective while enjoying the serene environment.

Wellness and leisure facilities are central to the Glee experience. The hotel includes a luxury spa, a heated swimming pool with a swim-up bar, and a fully equipped fitness centre. Families are also catered for through a dedicated kids’ club, making the property suitable for both adult and family-oriented stays. The combination of relaxation, recreation, and family-friendly features enhances its appeal as a full-service resort within the city.

Glee Nairobi is also a major destination for events and large-scale gatherings. The property offers nine versatile event venues, including the impressive Amethyst Ballroom, which can accommodate up to 700 guests, and the Magnolia Garden, an expansive outdoor venue capable of hosting up to 1,500 guests. These facilities make it ideal for conferences, weddings, and high-profile social events.

Dining at Glee Nairobi is one of its strongest highlights, with six distinct restaurants and bars offering diverse culinary experiences. The Hide Steakhouse provides a fine-dining experience focused on premium dry-aged meats, seafood, and sushi. Glow Restaurant offers Parisian-inspired all-day dining with international cuisine and buffet options. Peacock Restaurant & Bar delivers a creative fusion of Indian and Pan-Asian flavors in a stylish setting. For a more relaxed and social experience, the Horizon Rooftop Bar offers cocktails and skyline views, while the hotel’s vibrant nightclub and lounge provides late-night entertainment within the property.

The location of Glee Nairobi offers a unique balance between accessibility and seclusion. Situated in Runda along the Northern Bypass, it provides easy access to the UN complex, diplomatic zones, and Westlands, while maintaining a peaceful, resort-like environment away from the city’s congestion.

The overall atmosphere at Glee Nairobi is luxurious, expansive, and experience-driven, appealing to high-end travelers, diplomats, corporate guests, and families looking for a premium stay. Guests are drawn to its combination of modern design, nature integration, and diverse lifestyle offerings, making it one of Nairobi’s most exciting new hospitality destinations.

For travelers searching for luxury hotels in Runda Nairobi, 5-star resorts near the UN Nairobi, or high-end hotels with event spaces in Nairobi, Glee Nairobi stands out as a premier destination offering space, elegance, and a complete luxury experience.
slug.name: Glee Nairobi

slug.contentHtml:
The Emakoko Nairobi is a family-owned boutique safari lodge located on the southern boundary of Nairobi National Park. Designed as a unique alternative to traditional city hotels, the lodge allows guests to begin or end their Kenyan safari immersed in nature and wildlife rather than urban traffic, while still being just 45 minutes from both Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and Wilson Airport.

Built into a dramatic cliff face overlooking the Mbagathi River, The Emakoko offers a rare combination of wilderness and accessibility. The lodge blends seamlessly into its natural surroundings, with elevated views into the park and a design that prioritizes privacy, tranquility, and immersion in the landscape.

The property features 10 spacious safari cottages, divided between river-level suites and cliff-top rooms that offer panoramic views across the park. Each cottage is designed with a classic safari aesthetic, incorporating natural materials and warm finishes. Rooms include en-suite bathrooms with deep bathtubs, open fireplaces, and private verandas that overlook the river or surrounding bush, creating a peaceful and intimate atmosphere. A unique feature of the lodge is its custom-built funicular lift, which provides access between the lower main areas and the elevated cliffside rooms.

In addition to the main suites, The Emakoko offers The Private House, an exclusive-use two-bedroom villa designed for families or small groups. This residence includes its own private swimming pool and a dedicated safari vehicle, offering a highly personalized and private safari experience.

The lodge’s shared spaces are equally well-designed, centered around a main lounge with a large fireplace, an infinity swimming pool overlooking the river, and a restaurant known for its high-quality cuisine prepared using locally sourced ingredients. The atmosphere is relaxed yet refined, encouraging guests to unwind while staying connected to the natural environment.

The Emakoko’s location within Nairobi National Park provides direct access to one of Africa’s most unique wildlife reserves. Guests have a high chance of spotting four of the Big Five—lion, leopard, buffalo, and rhino, with the park being particularly known for its population of endangered black rhinos. Daily activities include private game drives, guided bird watching with over 400 recorded species, and nature walks along the park’s edge, offering an immersive safari experience without the need for long-distance travel.

The lodge also serves as a convenient base for nearby attractions, including the Sheldrick Wildlife Trust (Elephant Orphanage), the Giraffe Centre, and the Karen Blixen Museum, allowing guests to combine wildlife experiences with cultural visits.

Sustainability and conservation are at the heart of The Emakoko’s philosophy. Owned and operated by Anthony and Emma Childs, the lodge actively supports the Kenya Wildlife Service and contributes to conservation initiatives such as the “Lion Lights” program, which helps reduce human-wildlife conflict. The property also provides clean drinking water from its borehole to neighboring communities, reinforcing its commitment to both environmental and social impact.

The overall atmosphere at The Emakoko Nairobi is intimate, serene, and deeply connected to nature, making it ideal for travelers seeking a luxury safari experience within close proximity to the city. It is particularly well-suited for couples, wildlife enthusiasts, and international visitors looking for a seamless transition between urban arrival and safari adventure.

For travelers searching for safari lodges in Nairobi National Park, luxury wildlife stays near Nairobi, or boutique safari experiences close to JKIA, The Emakoko Nairobi stands out as one of the most unique and immersive destinations, offering a true safari experience at the edge of the city.
slug.name: The Emakoko

slug.contentHtml:
Nairobi Tented Camp is a rustic, eco-friendly safari retreat located in the forested Karen neighborhood along Dagoretti Road. Originally known as the only accommodation inside Nairobi National Park, the camp has since relocated to a serene and secluded setting while maintaining its authentic safari atmosphere. It offers guests a rare opportunity to experience a classic “under canvas” stay within close proximity to Nairobi’s key wildlife and cultural attractions.

Designed to deliver a true bush experience without leaving the city, the camp blends simplicity, sustainability, and comfort, making it ideal for travelers looking for a more immersive and nature-focused stay.

The property features 9 en-suite safari tents, each carefully designed to reflect traditional safari living while providing essential comforts. The tents are spacious and furnished with locally inspired décor, comfortable beds available in twin or double configurations, and large gauze windows that allow for natural airflow and cooling breezes. Each tent includes a private en-suite bathroom fitted with a flushing toilet and a classic safari-style bucket shower, with hot water provided upon request.

Nairobi Tented Camp operates with a strong commitment to sustainability. The camp is 100% solar-powered and avoids permanent structures to minimize its environmental footprint, preserving the natural surroundings and maintaining a low-impact presence within the forest environment.

The communal areas are designed to encourage relaxation and connection. Guests have access to a central lounge tent, a dedicated dining tent, and a small library stocked with books and games. While the experience is intentionally off-grid in feel, the camp still offers mobile phone signal and Wi-Fi in communal areas, allowing guests to stay connected when needed.

Dining at the camp is a highlight of the experience, with meals prepared in a homely, safari style. Guests can enjoy hearty breakfasts and three-course dinners, often served outdoors under the stars or around a campfire, enhancing the overall bush atmosphere. Stays are typically offered on a bed and breakfast basis, with options to upgrade to half-board or full-board packages.

The camp’s location in Karen provides easy access to some of Nairobi’s most popular attractions. Guests can take guided game drives into Nairobi National Park, located approximately 20 minutes away, where wildlife such as lions, rhinos, and giraffes can be seen against the backdrop of the city skyline. Nearby conservation experiences include the Sheldrick Wildlife Trust (Elephant Orphanage) and the Giraffe Centre, both within a short drive. Cultural attractions such as the Karen Blixen Museum and lifestyle destinations like The Hub Karen are also easily accessible. For outdoor enthusiasts, activities such as nature walks at Oloolua Forest and hiking in Ngong Hills are close by.

In terms of pricing, Nairobi Tented Camp offers an accessible safari experience compared to traditional lodges. Rates typically start from approximately $95 per person per night sharing, with a single supplement of around $40 and reduced rates for children. A small nightly conservation fee is also included, supporting local wildlife initiatives.

The overall atmosphere at Nairobi Tented Camp is simple, authentic, and nature-driven, appealing to travelers who value experience over luxury. Guests often appreciate the peaceful environment, personalized service, and the opportunity to experience a safari-style stay without traveling far from Nairobi.

For travelers searching for eco-friendly safari camps in Nairobi, tented camps near Nairobi National Park, or authentic safari experiences in Karen, Nairobi Tented Camp stands out as a unique and accessible option offering a genuine bush experience within the city’s reach.
slug.name: Nairobi Tented Camp

slug.contentHtml:
La Mada Hotel Nairobi is a tranquil 4-star boutique hotel located along Pipeline Estate Road, off Thika Road, set within a lush, forest-like environment on the edge of Karura Forest. Known for its peaceful atmosphere and natural surroundings, the hotel offers a unique escape from the city’s fast pace while still being just 15 to 20 minutes from Nairobi’s central areas.

Surrounded by greenery and featuring a small river that runs through the property, La Mada Hotel creates an immersive nature experience where guests often encounter local wildlife such as monkeys and a variety of bird species. This setting gives the hotel a distinct “hidden oasis” feel, making it one of the more serene stays in Nairobi.

The hotel features 35 well-appointed rooms, including 30 Deluxe Rooms and 5 Executive Suites. Each room is designed with comfort and functionality in mind, offering amenities such as air conditioning, work desks, mini-bars, and modern furnishings. The interiors are simple yet comfortable, allowing the natural surroundings to take center stage.

Dining at La Mada Hotel Nairobi offers a variety of options, with an on-site restaurant serving a mix of African, British, Indian, and international cuisine. Guests can also enjoy drinks and light meals at the poolside bar, or relax at the coffee shop within the property. The dining experience is casual and relaxed, complementing the overall atmosphere of the hotel.

The leisure facilities at La Mada Hotel enhance its appeal as a nature-focused retreat. Guests have access to a year-round outdoor swimming pool, a sun terrace, and expansive garden spaces that provide areas for relaxation and outdoor enjoyment. A fitness room is also available for those looking to maintain their exercise routine during their stay.

For business and events, the hotel offers four conference halls with capacities ranging from small meetings of 10 people to larger events of up to 380 guests. The natural setting also makes it a popular venue for weddings and outdoor functions, combining convenience with a scenic environment.

The location of La Mada Hotel Nairobi offers a balance between accessibility and seclusion. Situated approximately 10 kilometres from Nairobi’s city centre, it provides easy access via Thika Road while maintaining a quiet, nature-filled setting away from urban congestion.

In terms of pricing, the hotel is positioned in the mid-to-upper range category, with nightly rates typically starting from around KES 16,500, depending on the season and room type. This reflects the unique environment and spacious grounds offered by the property.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the serene environment, natural beauty, and relaxing atmosphere as standout features. Many visitors appreciate the feeling of being immersed in nature while still being close to the city. Some feedback notes that Wi-Fi connectivity can occasionally be inconsistent and restaurant service may be slow during busy periods, though the overall experience remains positive.

The atmosphere at La Mada Hotel Nairobi is calm, green, and retreat-like, making it particularly suitable for couples, nature lovers, and guests seeking a peaceful stay within Nairobi.

For travelers searching for hotels near Karura Forest, nature retreats in Nairobi, or quiet boutique hotels off Thika Road, La Mada Hotel Nairobi stands out as a unique destination offering tranquility, greenery, and a refreshing escape from the city.
slug.name: Hotel La Mada

slug.contentHtml:
Gigiri Express Hotel Nairobi is a practical 3-star business hotel located off UN Avenue in the Gigiri district, positioned behind the Rubis fuel station within a lively commercial complex. Known for its strategic location, the hotel is within walking distance of key international institutions such as the United Nations headquarters and the US Embassy, making it a convenient choice for diplomats, business travelers, and short-stay visitors.

The hotel offers 37 simple and functional rooms and apartments, designed to provide essential comfort for guests on short visits or work-related stays. Rooms are equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi, satellite TV, and large windows that allow for natural light. While the interiors are modest and unpretentious, they provide the necessary amenities for a convenient and affordable stay in one of Nairobi’s most premium neighborhoods.

Dining at Gigiri Express Hotel Nairobi is complemented by both on-site and nearby options. The hotel includes a restaurant and bar, while its location within a shopping complex gives guests immediate access to well-known eateries such as Java House, Domino’s Pizza, and Connect Coffee. This variety offers flexibility for guests looking for quick meals or casual dining without needing to travel far.

The hotel provides a range of basic services aimed at convenience and accessibility. These include a 24-hour front desk, airport transfer services available at an additional cost, laundry services, and free private parking. Some booking platforms also list limited wellness amenities such as a sauna and spa centre, though these are not the hotel’s primary focus.

The location is the hotel’s strongest advantage. Situated in Gigiri, it is approximately 0.42 kilometres from the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) headquarters and within close proximity to the Village Market shopping and lifestyle complex. The surrounding area also provides access to outdoor spaces such as Karura Forest, offering opportunities for walking, cycling, and nature exploration.

In terms of pricing, Gigiri Express Hotel Nairobi is positioned as a budget-friendly option within an otherwise high-cost area. Nightly rates typically range between KES 7,500 and KES 9,700, depending on availability and booking platform, making it an attractive choice for travelers seeking affordability in Gigiri.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the excellent location and friendly, helpful staff as key strengths, with location ratings often scoring highly. However, some feedback points to occasional issues with room maintenance, such as window fittings or water temperature, as well as inconsistent breakfast quality.

The overall atmosphere at Gigiri Express Hotel Nairobi is simple, convenient, and business-oriented, appealing primarily to travelers who prioritize location and value over luxury amenities.

For those searching for budget hotels in Gigiri Nairobi, hotels near the UN Nairobi, or affordable stays near Village Market, Gigiri Express Hotel Nairobi stands out as a practical and well-located option offering accessibility, convenience, and strong value in a prime area.
slug.name: Gigiri Express Hotel

slug.contentHtml:
Gigiri Lion Villas 2 Nairobi is a modern 5-star boutique hotel located along United Nations Avenue in the diplomatic district of Gigiri. Built in 2022, the property offers a refined and intimate hospitality experience, positioned just a short 5-minute walk from the United Nations Office at Nairobi and the Embassy of the United States. Its combination of luxury, privacy, and prime location makes it a top choice for business travelers, diplomats, and leisure guests seeking a quiet yet well-connected stay.

The hotel features 20 stylish and air-conditioned rooms, offering a boutique-scale experience with personalized service. Room categories include Deluxe Double Rooms, Superior Double Rooms, Double Rooms with Balconies, and Executive Suites. Each room is designed with modern finishes, comfortable furnishings, and practical amenities, creating a balance between elegance and functionality suitable for both short and extended stays.

Dining at Gigiri Lion Villas 2 Nairobi is centered around Hadika Restaurant, which offers a diverse menu featuring African, Indian, Italian, and international cuisine. The restaurant provides a relaxed yet refined setting for both casual dining and business meals. Guests can also enjoy a more laid-back atmosphere at the on-site coffee shop, ideal for quick refreshments or informal meetings.

The hotel offers a range of wellness and leisure facilities designed to enhance comfort and relaxation. Guests have access to a year-round outdoor swimming pool, a fully equipped 24-hour fitness centre, and spa facilities that include a sauna, steam room, and hot tub/Jacuzzi. The property is surrounded by lush gardens and shared lounge areas, adding to its peaceful and secluded ambiance.

Additional services include a 24-hour front desk, complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, free private parking, and airport shuttle services available at an additional cost (approximately $30). These amenities ensure a seamless and convenient stay for both local and international guests.

The location of Gigiri Lion Villas 2 Nairobi is one of its strongest advantages. Situated approximately 0.9 kilometres from Village Market, the hotel offers easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment options. It is also close to Karura Forest, providing opportunities for outdoor activities such as walking, cycling, and nature exploration within minutes of the property.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the quiet and peaceful environment, attentive staff, and the hotel’s proximity to key international institutions as standout features. It is particularly favored by business travelers who require quick and convenient access to the UN complex, as well as leisure guests seeking a calm and secure stay in Nairobi.

The overall atmosphere at Gigiri Lion Villas 2 Nairobi is modern, private, and upscale, offering a boutique alternative to larger luxury hotels. Its smaller size allows for a more personalized experience while maintaining high-end standards.

For travelers searching for boutique hotels in Gigiri Nairobi, luxury hotels near the UN Nairobi, or quiet high-end stays near Village Market, Gigiri Lion Villas 2 Nairobi stands out as a premium option offering comfort, convenience, and a refined boutique experience.
slug.name: Gigiri Lion Villas 2

slug.contentHtml:
Windsor Golf Hotel & Country Club Nairobi is a premier five-star Victorian-themed resort located along Kigwa Lane, off Kiambu Road in the serene Ridgeways area. Renowned for hosting one of Africa’s leading 18-hole championship golf courses, the property sits on over 200 acres of beautifully landscaped gardens and indigenous forest, offering a tranquil and luxurious escape just 15 to 25 minutes from Nairobi’s Central Business District.

The resort is designed with a distinctive Victorian architectural style, giving it a timeless and elegant atmosphere that sets it apart from more modern hotels in the city. Surrounded by lush greenery and natural forest, the property creates a peaceful, countryside-like environment while remaining within close reach of Nairobi’s main urban areas.

The centerpiece of Windsor Golf Hotel & Country Club Nairobi is its world-class 18-hole championship golf course, designed by Tom Macauley and opened in 1992. The par-72 course stretches over 7,277 yards and sits at an altitude of approximately 6,000 feet, where the thinner air allows the golf ball to travel further. The course is complemented by excellent facilities, including a driving range, practice putting greens, and a fully equipped pro shop, with professional coaching available for both beginners and experienced players. The course is also known for its natural setting, where players often encounter wildlife such as monkeys and over 130 species of birds.

The hotel offers 130 elegantly designed rooms, suites, and cottages, all styled to reflect the classic Victorian theme. Accommodation options range from deluxe rooms to spacious studio suites and private cottages, many of which offer views of the golf course or surrounding forest. The interiors combine traditional charm with modern comfort, providing a refined and relaxing stay.

Dining at Windsor Golf Hotel & Country Club Nairobi is diverse and high-quality, with four restaurants and three bars available on the property. The Windsor Room offers fine international dining in a formal setting, while The Conservatory provides a more relaxed environment overlooking the pool and operates 24 hours. The range of dining options caters to both casual and upscale experiences, making the resort suitable for a variety of guests.

The wellness and recreational facilities at the resort are extensive. Guests have access to a full-service spa offering treatments such as Ayurvedic therapies, a state-of-the-art fitness centre, and a heated outdoor swimming pool. Additional facilities include tennis and squash courts, as well as scenic jogging and cycling tracks measuring 2.5 km, 3 km, and 5 km that wind through the tropical forest, enhancing the outdoor experience.

Windsor Golf Hotel & Country Club Nairobi is also a major venue for events and large gatherings. Its expansive grounds and dedicated facilities can host up to 2,000 guests, making it a popular choice for weddings, corporate conferences, and high-profile events. The combination of space, natural beauty, and infrastructure allows for both indoor and outdoor event setups.

The location offers both convenience and exclusivity. Situated in Ridgeways, the resort is approximately 30 to 45 minutes from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and about 25 minutes from Wilson Airport, making it accessible for both international and domestic travelers while maintaining a peaceful, secluded environment.

In terms of pricing, Windsor Golf Hotel & Country Club Nairobi is positioned within the luxury segment. Nightly rates typically average around KES 27,000 to KES 30,000, depending on room type and season. For golf enthusiasts, green fees are approximately KES 7,500 on weekdays and KES 10,000 on weekends, making it a premium golfing destination.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the beautiful grounds, high-quality golf course, and the overall tranquil atmosphere as standout features. The property is especially appreciated by golfers, couples, and guests seeking a resort-style experience within Nairobi. Some feedback notes that certain interiors may feel traditional compared to newer hotels, though this aligns with the resort’s classic Victorian identity.

The overall atmosphere at Windsor Golf Hotel & Country Club Nairobi is elegant, spacious, and nature-oriented, offering a unique blend of luxury, heritage, and outdoor recreation.

For travelers searching for golf resorts in Nairobi, luxury hotels with golf courses in Kenya, or peaceful resort stays near Kiambu Road, Windsor Golf Hotel & Country Club Nairobi stands out as one of the most iconic and complete hospitality destinations in the region.

Ole Sereni Nairobi is a distinctive hotel located along Mombasa Road, uniquely positioned to overlook Nairobi National Park. The property is made up of two adjacent wings: the original Ole Sereni Hotel, which offers a more heritage-inspired safari lodge feel, and the newer Emara Ole-Sereni, which delivers a modern 5-star luxury experience. Together, they create one of the most iconic hospitality destinations in Nairobi, blending urban convenience with direct wildlife views.

The hotel’s most remarkable feature is its uninterrupted views into Nairobi National Park, allowing guests to spot wildlife such as lions, giraffes, zebras, and antelopes directly from their rooms, restaurants, and even the pool areas. This rare combination of city and safari makes Ole Sereni one of the few hotels in the world where guests can experience wildlife without leaving the property.

The accommodation is split across the two wings, offering different styles and levels of luxury. The original Ole Sereni Hotel features cozy rooms, club rooms, and “Wow Suites”, designed with safari-lodge aesthetics, including warm wooden finishes and earthy tones. The Emara Ole-Sereni wing offers a more contemporary experience with Superior City View Rooms, Deluxe Park-Facing Rooms, and One-Bedroom Suites, all featuring modern finishes and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize views of the park or Nairobi skyline.

Dining at Ole Sereni Nairobi is a major highlight, with multiple restaurants designed to enhance the wildlife-viewing experience. The Big Five Restaurant, located at the waterhole level, offers a diverse international menu while overlooking areas where animals often gather. Eagle’s The Steakhouse, a rooftop fine-dining venue, is known for premium cuts of meat and panoramic views of both the park and the city skyline. The Ngong Pool Bar provides a relaxed setting for sundowners and cocktails, making it a popular spot for both guests and visitors.

The hotel also offers a range of wellness and leisure facilities, including a fully equipped fitness centre, a luxury spa known as Duma Spa, and swimming pools that overlook the park. These amenities create a balanced experience combining relaxation, fitness, and nature.

Ole Sereni Nairobi is also well-equipped for business and events, with modern conference facilities and meeting spaces that cater to corporate travelers, conferences, and social events. Its proximity to both the airport and the city centre makes it a practical choice for business travel.

The location is one of the hotel’s strongest advantages. Situated along Mombasa Road, it is approximately 10 to 15 minutes from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and within easy reach of Nairobi’s Central Business District. This makes it ideal for transit stays, business trips, and short luxury getaways.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the unique wildlife views, excellent location, and the overall novelty of the experience as standout features. Many visitors appreciate the ability to enjoy a safari-like environment without leaving Nairobi, while also having access to modern luxury amenities.

The overall atmosphere at Ole Sereni Nairobi is a blend of urban sophistication and safari immersion, appealing to business travelers, international visitors, and couples looking for a unique stay.

For travelers searching for hotels overlooking Nairobi National Park, luxury hotels near JKIA, or unique safari-style hotels in Nairobi, Ole Sereni Nairobi stands out as one of the most iconic and memorable stays, offering an unmatched combination of wildlife, convenience, and modern comfort.

House of Waine Nairobi is an exclusive 5-star boutique hotel located in the prestigious Karen suburb, set on approximately 2.5 acres of beautifully landscaped gardens. Originally built as a private family residence, the property was converted into a luxury hotel in 2004 and has retained its intimate “home away from home” atmosphere through personalized service, elegant interiors, and a strong attention to detail. Its quiet setting and refined character make it one of Nairobi’s most sought-after boutique stays for luxury travelers.

The hotel features 11 individually designed rooms and suites, each uniquely styled and named after Kenyan themes such as “Ziwa” (Lake) and “Tembo” (Elephant). The rooms are spacious and filled with natural light, offering large windows, air conditioning, marble bathtubs, and tea and coffee-making facilities. The design combines classic elegance with subtle African influences, creating a warm and sophisticated environment.

Accommodation options include Standard Rooms, which provide comfort and charm with garden views, as well as more exclusive spaces such as the Malaika Suite, which features a private lounge, a terrace overlooking the gardens, and a spacious en-suite bathroom. For guests seeking additional privacy, the Poolside Cottage offers a separate two-bedroom residence with a fully equipped kitchen, private dining area, and its own garden space, making it ideal for families or small groups.

Dining at House of Waine Nairobi is highly personalized and flexible. Meals are served in a variety of settings, including the main dining room, lounge, poolside terrace, or secluded garden corners, allowing guests to enjoy a tailored experience. The menu changes daily and focuses on fresh, locally inspired cuisine that reflects the diverse flavors of Nairobi, offering a more intimate and curated alternative to standard hotel dining.

The property’s outdoor spaces are a defining feature, with lush tropical gardens providing a peaceful and secluded environment. Guests can relax by the heated swimming pool, enjoy quiet walks through the grounds, or unwind in private corners of the garden. The atmosphere is calm, elegant, and residential, reinforcing the boutique nature of the hotel.

For business travelers or small gatherings, the hotel includes an air-conditioned conference room that can accommodate up to 20 people, along with a private terrace for breakout sessions or informal meetings. Additional services enhance the guest experience, including a welcome drink on arrival, daily fresh cookies and flowers in each room, and complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi.

House of Waine Nairobi is strategically located in Karen, offering convenient access to some of Nairobi’s most popular attractions. Guests are within close proximity to the Giraffe Centre, the David Sheldrick Wildlife Trust, the Karen Blixen Museum, and Nairobi National Park, making it an ideal base for pre- or post-safari stays.

In terms of pricing, House of Waine Nairobi is positioned within the ultra-luxury boutique segment. Rates typically start from approximately $670 per night on a bed and breakfast basis, with options for half-board and full-board packages available. The pricing reflects the exclusivity, personalized service, and intimate scale of the property.

Guest reviews frequently highlight the exceptional service, peaceful environment, and attention to detail as standout features. Many visitors appreciate the sense of privacy and the personalized hospitality that distinguishes it from larger hotels.

The overall atmosphere at House of Waine Nairobi is elegant, intimate, and residential, making it particularly suited for couples, luxury travelers, and guests seeking a quiet retreat within Nairobi.

For travelers searching for luxury boutique hotels in Karen Nairobi, exclusive garden hotels in Nairobi, or intimate pre-safari stays near Nairobi National Park, House of Waine Nairobi stands out as one of the most refined and personalized hospitality experiences in the city.
